LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_91.english: After all, Miss Iris deserved to be punished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_91.korean: 그야 이리스 양이 맞을 짓을 했으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_92.english: What?! Is that what you should be saying to me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_92.korean: 뭐어?! 그게 지금 나한테 할 소리야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_93.english: Then, what can I do for you to forgive me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_94.english: I don't want to get hit back by Miss Iris just like that...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_94.korean: 제가 똑같이 이리스 양에게 한 대 맞는 건 싫으니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_95.english: Won't you forgive me for this?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_97.english: Yes, you like them, don't you? Teddy bears.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_98.english: Huh!? Why do you think I like teddy bears!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_98.korean: 하아!? 내가 왜 곰인형을 좋아한다고 생각하는데!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_99.english: You were staring at me intently last time, weren't you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_10.english: Deep sleep? Are you saying I'm going to die and rest in eternal sleep?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_10.korean: 깊은 잠이라니, 내가 죽어서 영면이라도 한다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_11.english: And why are you all gathering so casually in my room again! Everyone, go back!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_11.korean: 그리고 왜 또 내 방에 자연스럽게 모여 있는 건데! 다들 돌아가!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_12.english: Don't be so hurtful. It's okay to have a little conversation before falling asleep, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_12.korean: 섭섭한 소리 마세요.&n잠들기 전에 대화 정도는 괜찮잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_13.english: If you need it, I can lend you my coffin. It is originally for you, Master, but for Draculina, it is fine for just a little while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_13.korean: 필요하다면 제 관을 빌려드릴게요.&n원래 주인님을 위한 거지만, 드라큐리나를 위해서라면 잠깐 정도는 괜찮아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_14.english: Ah, but do you really have to return it later?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_14.korean: 아, 그래도 나중에 꼭 돌려주셔야 해요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_15.english: You're offering to lend it to me... No, I don't need it at all in the first place!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_15.korean: 빌려준다니… 아니, 애초에 전혀 필요 없어!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_16.english: Working up a sweat all day, taking a shower, drinking some cold tomato juice, and getting eight hours of good sleep—that's all I need!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_16.korean: 나는 땀 흘리며 하루 일하고, 샤워한 다음 시원한 토마토 주스 마시고, 8시간 푹 자면 그걸로 충분하다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_18.english: I knew it, but... yeah, my words mean nothing... and you don't seem to have any intention of going back...
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_18.korean: 알고는 있었지만… 응, 내 말은 아무 의미도 없구나…&n돌아갈 생각도 없어 보이고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_19.english: My master has been sleeping somewhere other than his room lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_19.korean: 주인님이 요즘 방이 아닌 곳에서 주무시고 계셔요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_20.english: On top of that, it's turning into a topic I don't know again...

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_21.english: We're friends, you know. I should at least listen to a friend's worries.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_22.english: I know that too! That's why I end up helping you all the time, even though I get pushed around by you guys!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_22.korean: 그건 나도 알아!&n그래서 매번 너희한테 휘둘리면서도 결국 도와주잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_24.english: What's with that look in your eyes!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_26.english: So what? What are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_27.english: My master has been sleeping somewhere other than his room lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_27.korean: 주인님이 요즘 방이 아닌 곳에서 주무시고 계셔요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_29.english: Ah, I roughly know about that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_30.english: Being inside that virtual reality game or whatever it is.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_30.korean: 가상 현실 게임인지 뭔지, 그 안에 들어가 있는 거.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_31.english: I've only heard about it so I don't know for sure, but I assume you're talking about that thing that was recently discovered.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_31.korean: 나도 듣기만 해서 잘은 모르지만, 최근에 발견했다는 그거 말하는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_34.english: Virtual Reality is abbreviated as VR. It refers to an artificial world that feels like it is right in front of your eyes, created using computers or machines.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_34.korean: 가상 현실(Virtual Reality) 줄여서 VR이라고 불러요.&n컴퓨터나 기계를 이용해 눈앞에 있는 것처럼 느끼는 인공 세계를 말하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_36.english: Simply put, it is a technology that makes you feel like your body is here, but your gaze and senses are in another world.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_36.korean: 쉽게 말하면 몸은 여기 있지만, 시선과 감각은 다른 세상에 있는 것처럼 느끼게 해주는 기술이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_37.english: You had your eyes closed; I see you weren't sleeping.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_37.korean: 눈을 감고 계셨는데, 주무시는 게 아니었군요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_38.english: It just looks like they are asleep; they are actually functioning perfectly fine in virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_38.korean: 잠든 것처럼 보일 뿐, 가상 현실에서 멀쩡히 활동하고 있는 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_40.english: I'm interested in that machine too. The commander asked me not to touch it for now, so I'm waiting, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_40.korean: 저도 그 기계엔 관심 있어요.&n사령관이 지금은 건드리지 말아 달라 부탁해서 기다리고 있지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_41.english: But since you said it would be fine once the work is done... Hehe, I'm so excited I might not be able to contain my excitement.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_41.korean: 대신 일이 끝나면 괜찮다고 했으니… 후후, 기대돼서 흥분을 참을 수 없을지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_42.english: Anyway, you don't have to worry too much.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_44.english: I'm telling you, I'm talking about another created world!… The story just never ends!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_44.korean: 그러니까 만들어진 다른 세상을 말하는 거라니까!&n…이야기가 도대체 끝나질 않네!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_47.english: - A bioroid created by Lion Corporation…

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_55.english: I was getting ready to go in.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_56.english: I was created to serve you, Master, from cradle to grave, and into the eternal afterlife after closing my eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_56.korean: 저는 요람에서 무덤까지, 그리고 눈을 감은 이후의 영원한 사후 세계까지 주인님을 섬기기 위해 만들어졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_57.english: So, Master, I want to know about that 'afterlife' where you close your eyes and leave...
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_57.korean: 그러니까 주인님께서 눈을 감고 떠나는 그 ‘사후 세계’를… 알고 싶어요

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_58.english: - An afterlife you leave with your eyes closed…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_61.english: Yes, it's alright. As long as I can go with you, Master, anywhere... any place... I will protect you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_61.korean: 네, 괜찮아요.&n주인님과 함께 갈 수만 있다면, 어디든… 어떤 곳이든… 제가 지켜드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_62.english: Welcome, Commander. I have finished preparing to connect to virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_62.korean: 어서 오세요, 사령관.&n가상 현실에 접속할 준비는 다 끝내놨어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_66.english: Azaz, I want to sleep with you, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_66.korean: 아자즈, 저도 주인님과 같이 잠들고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_67.english: Yes, of course. I anticipated that, so I've already prepared it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_67.korean: 네, 물론이에요.&n그럴 줄 알고 이미 준비해 두었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_7.english: I heard that Draculina has fallen into a deep sleep.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_70.english: Because today, I will only look.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_71.english: - Really? I can trust you, right... Azaz? Because I really do trust you??
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_71.korean: - 정말이지? 믿어도 되는 거지... 아자즈? 정말로 믿고 있으니까??

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_75.english: Ah... um... shall I sing you a lullaby...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_79.english: I felt like I could go anywhere if I walked holding your hand.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_79.korean: 그대 손을 잡고 걸으면&n어디라도 갈 수 있을 것만 같았는데

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_8.english: Thank you for letting me know.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_80.english: Now, it has all become a story of the past.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_81.english: - The sense of relief and warmth of Eternity that feels as always.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_10.english: Let go! Let go of this!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_11.english: Please stay still. If you struggle like that

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_14.english: This might be better than letting it run wild.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_14.korean: 날뛰게 두는 것보단 이 편이 나을지도 모르지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_16.english: Master, shall I put it in a coffin?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_18.english: Thanks to my master's instructions, I was able to avoid serious injury.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_18.korean: 주인님 지시 덕분에 큰 상처는 피할 수 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_19.english: - Thanks to Eternity, we succeeded in safely subduing it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_2.english: - With Eternity's decisive blow, the signal for the end sounded.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_2.korean: - 이터니티의 결정적 타격으로 그 끝을 알리는 신호가 울렸다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_21.english: - Will they really be able to safely retrieve it from Desire's grasp this time as well...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_21.korean: - 이번에도 과연, 데자이어의 손아귀로부터 무사히 되돌릴 수 있을까…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_4.english: Haha… Ahahahaha! Great! This smell of blood filling my mouth… It’s been so long!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_4.korean: 하하… 아하하하하! 좋아! 입안 가득 번지는 이 피 냄새… 정말 오랜만이에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_5.english: Alright, this is the last one! Go ahead and kill me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_5.korean: 자, 이제 마지막이에요! 어서 절 죽여 보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_6.english: You are already not in a condition to fight properly. You can't even move your arms properly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_6.korean: 당신은 이미 제대로 싸울 수 있는 상태가 아니에요.&n팔조차 제대로 움직이지 못하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_7.english: What do you know to be talking so recklessly! Nothing is over yet!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_7.korean: 뭘 안다고 멋대로 떠드는 거죠! 아직 아무것도 끝나지 않았어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_8.english: I'll take you to your master just like this.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_9.english: Don't make me laugh…! I still…! Ugh…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_1.english: - Is this… not a blank space?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_10.english: Yes, I am also happy to have you by my side, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_10.korean: 네, 저도 주인님이 곁에 계셔서 행복해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_100.english: Well, I have no intention of dealing with someone who is obviously going to run away. After all, there is nothing more annoying than having things cut off in the middle of having fun.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_100.korean: 뭐, 도망칠 게 뻔한 인간을 상대할 생각은 없지만 말이죠.&n한창 즐기는 도중에 끊기는 것만큼 짜증나는 일도 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_102.english: … I’ll be going now. I have prey ahead of me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_102.korean: …전 이만 가보겠습니다. 앞에 쫓는 사냥감이 있답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_107.english: You're more persistent than I thought. If you value your life, get out of my sight right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_107.korean: 생각보다 끈질기군요.&n목숨이 아깝다면 당장 내 눈앞에서 사라지시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_108.english: I don't have time for someone who ends up dead after a single cut. Believe it or not, I'm a busy person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_108.korean: 한 번 베이면 그걸로 끝나는 인간에게 내어줄 시간은 없답니다.&n이래 봬도 바쁜 몸이라서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_109.english: Judging by the looks of it… you are a moth just learning to flap its wings and running wild. It seems you looked down on others just because you had climbed a little higher, and have even forgotten your own weakness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_109.korean: 보아하니… 막 날갯짓을 배우고 설치는 나방이군요.&n조금 높이 올랐다고 남을 내려보다가, 제 나약함마저 잊어버린 모양이지요

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_11.english: This very moment I spend laughing with my Master... is the most precious to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_11.korean: 주인님과 함께 웃으며 보내는 지금 이 순간이… 저에게는 가장 소중해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_110.english: - What should I do...? We're not communicating as well as I thought. But I can't just let it go like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_110.korean: - 어떡하지…? 생각보다 대화가 안 통해. 그렇다고 이대로 보낼 수는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_111.english: - Do I have to subdue it here...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_111.korean: - 여기서는 한 번 제압을 해야 하나…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_115.english: What exactly are you trying to do since earlier?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_115.korean: 당신은… 아까부터 계속 뭐 하자는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_116.english: With such strange attire, calling me "Master"? Is this a maid game?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_117.english: You aren't normal either, carrying a maid like this around.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_117.korean: 이런 메이드를 데리고 다니는 당신도 정상은 아니군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_119.english: Did you just tell me to cancel? I'm sorry, but... I guess I won't be able to.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_119.korean: 당신, 방금 취소하라 했습니까?&n안타깝지만… 그러지 못하겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_120.english: I didn't lie. No matter how I look at it, you only seem like a weak man.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_120.korean: 저는 거짓을 말하지 않았습니다.&n아무리 봐도 나약한 남자로밖에 안 보이는데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_121.english: If you won't cancel... I'll prove it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_124.english: Okay, I’m getting a little interested. He’s a much more interesting opponent than the ones I’ve fought so far.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_124.korean: 좋아요, 조금은 흥미가 생겼어요.&n지금까지 싸워온 것보다는 훨씬 흥미로운 상대군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_125.english: This place is cramped, so let's change locations. There is a better battlefield up ahead.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_125.korean: 이곳은 비좁으니 장소를 바꾸죠.&n앞에 더 좋은 싸움터가 있답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_126.english: I'll be waiting there... so go ahead and prove it to me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_126.korean: 거기서 기다리고 있을 테니… 어디 한 번 증명해 보시죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_129.english: No. Even if I had stepped forward, the result certainly wouldn't have been much different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_129.korean: 아닙니다.&n분명 제가 나섰어도 결과는 크게 다르지 않았을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_130.english: Hmm... but isn't it not absolutely necessary to chase after them? It's not like they are causing us any harm right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_130.korean: 흐음… 그런데 꼭 쫓아갈 필요는 없지 않습니까?&n지금 당장 저희에게 피해를 주는 것도 아니고요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_131.english: Maybe that is the case for now. Because it doesn't seem like it has been completely consumed by Desire yet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_131.korean: 지금은 그럴지도 모르지.&n아직 데자이어에 완전히 잠식된 것 같진 않으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_132.english: But if you are eventually consumed by desire, even what little reason you have left will vanish. By then, it will be too late.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_132.korean: 하지만 언젠가 욕망에 잡아먹히면, 그때는 남아 있는 이성마저 사라질 거야.&n그때가 되면 늦어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_133.english: Well, at least it seems we can communicate, so I suppose that’s a relief. Oh, and of course, I’ll just be cheering you on from behind, Neve!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_133.korean: 뭐, 말은 통하는 것 같으니 그나마 다행이라면 다행이군요.&n아, 물론 저는 네브 씨 뒤에서 열심히 응원만 하겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_137.english: I have a favor to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_139.english: I gave my permission because their resolve was so firm, but... honestly, I'm worried.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_139.korean: 의지가 너무 확고해서 허락하긴 했습니다만… 솔직히 걱정이 되는군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_140.english: Do you believe that because she is strong?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_142.english: … As expected, it turned out this way. Though I did anticipate it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_144.english: But wouldn't doing this actually prove that your master is weak?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_144.korean: 하지만 이래서는 오히려 당신 주인이 나약하다는 걸 증명하는 꼴이지 않겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_145.english: It essentially means sending the maid out alone like this.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_146.english: Master is much stronger than me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_147.english: That person? He didn't look like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_15.english: Mr. Nev, how long do we have to keep doing this?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_15.korean: 네브 씨, 저희 언제까지 이러고 있어야 합니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_150.english: No matter how many times I confronted it, it didn't subside at all.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_150.korean: 몇 번을 맞서도, 전혀 수그러들지 않았어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_152.english: So, Master, you are absolutely not weak.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_153.korean: 지, 지금 무슨 소리를 하시는 거죠!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_155.english: The weakness I was talking about isn't that kind of thing!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_155.korean: 제가 말한 나약함은 그런 걸 말하는 게 아니에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_156.english: Honestly… talking to you makes me feel like a fool. To think you would blurt out such blasphemous words so casually…
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_156.korean: 정말이지… 당신과 얘기하다 보면 제가 다 바보가 되는 기분이군요.&n그런 불경한 말을 아무렇지도 않게 내뱉다니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_157.english: Well, fine. It doesn't really matter. After all, it is true that I have become interested in you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_157.korean: 뭐, 좋아요. 아무래도 상관없습니다.&n당신에게 흥미가 생긴 건 사실이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_158.english: Alright, bring it on! I can take you on anytime!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_158.korean: 자아, 덤벼보시죠!&n전 얼마든지 상대해 드릴 수 있답니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_16.english: It is clear that it is not the case, at least not now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_17.english: Of course, that was even before the two of you were lost in your own world!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_17.korean: 물론 두 분께서 ‘둘만의 세계’에 빠져 계시기 전부터죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_18.english: It seems like Miss Eternity noticed us from the beginning, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_18.korean: ‘이터니티 양’은 처음부터 저희를 눈치채고 계셨던 것 같지만 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_19.english: Commander, we are here to investigate the movements of the Soul Junk. If possible… we would appreciate it if you could handle that when it is just the two of you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_19.korean: 사령관 씨, 저희는 소울정크들의 움직임을 조사하러 나왔습니다.&n가능하다면… 그런 건 둘만 계실 때 해주셨으면 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_20.english: Oh? What is it, Mr. Nev? Are you perhaps jealous? Then Miriam will be sad.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_20.korean: 호오? 뭡니까 네브 씨, 혹시 질투라도 하시는 겁니까?&n그럼 미리엄 씨가 슬퍼할 텐데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_21.english: Kent, it's not like that. And don't say anything to Miriam.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_21.korean: 켄트, 그런 거 아니야.&n그리고 미리엄에게는 아무 말도 하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_22.english: Hahaha! Don't worry, I have that much common sense! Well, though, that situation does seem like it would be quite fun!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_22.korean: 하하하! 걱정 마세요, 저도 그 정도 눈치는 있습니다!&n뭐, 그래도 그 상황은 꽤 재미있을 것 같긴 하지만요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_24.english: - … What is going on and how?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_34.english: It's the first time I've heard that name. Kent, have you ever heard of it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_34.korean: 처음 듣는 이름입니다.&n켄트 너는 들어본 적 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_35.english: No, I'm hearing it for the first time, too. None of the people who recently joined the camp had such a name.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_35.korean: 아뇨, 저도 처음 듣습니다.&n최근 캠프에 합류한 사람들 중엔 그런 이름을 가진 자는 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_36.english: Are you sure you haven't mistaken me for someone else?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_36.korean: 혹시 다른 사람과 착각하신 거 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_4.english: - Oh, right! Eternity…! Surely she didn't fall again like Hela, did she?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_4.korean: - 아, 맞다! 이터니티…! 설마 이번에도 헬라처럼 떨어진 건 아니겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_41.english: Yes, I understand. If it doesn't cause you any harm... I won't go out of my way to remove it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_41.korean: 네, 알겠어요.&n주인님께 해가 되지 않는다면… 굳이 제거하진 않을게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_43.english: Alright then, let's start the investigation again! If my prediction is correct... this investigation will by no means be easy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_43.korean: 자, 그럼 다시 조사를 시작하죠!&n제 예상이 맞다면… 이번 조사는 결코 쉽지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_44.english: Anyway, there are an insane number of Soul Junk today. Hehe... I wonder if a human slaughter party broke out nearby?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_44.korean: 그나저나 오늘따라 소울정크가 엄청나게 많군요.&n큭큭… 근처에서 인간 살육 파티라도 벌어진 건 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_45.english: Kent… don’t say things like that, even as a joke. It’s certainly true that there is more than usual, but…
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_45.korean: 켄트… 농담이라도 그런 말은 하지 마.&n확실히 여느 때보다 많은 건 사실이지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_46.english: I do know exactly when Soul Junk gathers like this... but... I just hope it's not.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_46.korean: 이렇게 소울정크가 모이는 때가 언제인지 딱 하나 알고 있긴 한데…&n…아니었으면 하는 마음뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_47.english: You mean when Desire Walker is nearby, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_47.korean: 데자이어 워커가 근처에 있을 때 말씀이시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_48.english: - Desire Walker… Then does that mean the owner of the third record is nearby?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_48.korean: - 데자이어 워커… 그렇다면 세 번째 기록의 주인이 근처에 있다는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_49.english: That is correct. The Desire Energy emitted by Desire Walkers is the ultimate prey for Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_49.korean: 그렇습니다.&n데자이어 워커가 방출하는 데자이어 에너지는 소울정크에겐 최고의 먹잇감이거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_50.english: Of course, usually the opposite happens.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_50.korean: 물론, 대개는 반대로 먹히는 쪽이 되지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_51.english: I will make sure no one harms my master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_51.korean: 그 누구도 주인님에게 해를 끼치지 못하게 할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_52.english: I will definitely protect you, Master, so please do not worry.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_52.korean: 주인님은 제가 반드시 지켜드릴 테니 걱정하지 말아주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_53.english: Wow, that sounds like something out of a romance drama! You're so lucky, Commander!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_53.korean: 이야~ 로맨스 드라마에서나 나올 법한 멘트로군요!&n좋으시겠네요, 사령관 씨!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_55.english: Enough small talk. Let's hurry and get started with the investigation. For some reason... I have a bad feeling...
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_55.korean: 잡담은 여기까지. 서둘러 조사를 시작하자.&n왠지… 안 좋은 예감이 들어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_56.english: Shh... I think it's over there.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_57.english: A giant scythe… If it is a weapon handled only by Walkers, it is highly likely to be a Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_57.korean: 거대한 낫…&n워커들만 다루는 무기라면, 데자이어 워커일 가능성이 매우 높군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_61.english: Why are you making such a fuss over just one leg? You can still move!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_61.korean: 고작 다리 하나 잘린 거 가지고 왜 그러시죠? 아직 더 움직일 수 있잖아요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_62.english: Now, crawl around miserably, scattering filthy black blood! If you reattach your legs, I'll just cut them off again!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_62.korean: 자, 더러운 검은 피를 흩뿌리면서 비참하게 기어다녀 보세요!&n다리를 붙이면 다시 베어드리면 되니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_64.english: - … The girl who appeared to be a Desire Walker was literally slaughtering the surrounding Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_64.korean: - …데자이어 워커로 보이는 소녀는 주변의 소울정크를 그야말로 학살하고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_65.english: Commander! You must not disparage others carelessly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_65.korean: 사령관 씨! 남을 함부로 비하하면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_68.english: No matter what expression you use, it is clearly not a normal state. After all, Desire Energy eventually drives a person's reason insane.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_68.korean: 무슨 표현을 쓰든 정상적인 상태가 아닌 건 분명해.&n데자이어 에너지는 결국 사람의 이성을 미치게 만들어 버리니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_70.english: I plan to talk to them first.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_71.english: Are you seriously talking while pointing weapons at each other? That's cool! You're really cool, Mr. Nev!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_71.korean: 설마 무기를 맞대며 얘기하는 겁니까?&n멋지군요! 정말 멋져요 네브 씨!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_72.english: I'm just going to strike up a normal conversation. I don't intend to try anything special.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_72.korean: 그냥 평범하게 말을 걸 거야. 특별히 뭔가를 더 시도할 생각은 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_73.english: Wait here for now. I have a bad feeling about this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_73.korean: 일단 여기서 기다리고 있어. 느낌이 좋지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_74.english: You are absolutely right. If we step forward together, it seems we might just lose our heads for no reason.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_74.korean: 지당하신 말씀입니다. 같이 나섰다간 괜히 목만 날아갈 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_75.english: Or… we could just give up and go back to camp. They aren't exactly coming our way, and it looks too dangerous.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_75.korean: 아니면… 그냥 포기하고 캠프로 돌아갈 수도 있습니다.&n딱히 저희 쪽으로 오는 것도 아니고, 너무 위험해 보입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_76.english: If I don't stop this here, someone else will be in danger just the same. I have to stop this before more damage occurs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_76.korean: 여기서 막지 않으면, 다른 누군가가 위험에 처하는 건 마찬가지야.&n더 많은 피해가 나오기 전에 내가 멈춰야 해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_77.english: The strong protect the weak… Hehe, you are always amazing, Mr. Nev.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_77.korean: 힘 있는 자가 약자를 지킨다… 후후, 언제나 대단하십니다, 네브 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_78.english: I'm not trying to act cool, so don't flatter me. I'll be right back. Just wait here quietly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_78.korean: 폼 잡을 생각 없으니까 치켜세우지 마.&n일단 다녀올게, 여기서 조용히 기다리고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_8.english: I will never leave my master's side, anytime, anywhere.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_8.korean: 저는 언제 어디서나 주인님 곁을 떠나지 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_80.english: What? You mean the Commander? That is…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_82.english: I will definitely protect you, Master.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_84.english: It looks like it won't do any good to try and stop it this time either.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_85.english: I don't know why, but... Commander, I feel that I can trust you with this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_85.korean: 이유는 모르겠지만… 사령관 씨, 당신에게라면 믿고 맡겨도 괜찮을 거라는 생각이 듭니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_86.english: Understood. Then, I will leave it to you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_88.english: Commander! Don't worry! If anything happens, I'll rush to camp and call for backup!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_88.korean: 사령관 씨! 걱정 마세요!&n만약 무슨 일이 생기면 제가 바로 캠프로 달려가 지원을 부르겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_89.english: … I guess I don't need to worry about it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_91.english: So these are the people who have been following us for a while.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_92.english: I don't know who you are, but I have no interest in you. I'm in the middle of having fun, so please don't disturb me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_92.korean: 누구신지는 모르겠지만, 당신들에게는 관심 없답니다.&n한창 즐기던 중이니 방해하지 마시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_93.english: Raising your voice... I can't tell if that's courageous or just ignorant.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_93.korean: 언성을 높이다니… 용기 있는 건지, 단순히 무지한 건지 알 수 없군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_94.english: Normally I would have chopped off that arrogant neck... but let's just go today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_94.korean: 평소 같으면 그 잘난 목을 잘라냈겠지만…&n오늘은 그냥 가도록 하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_99.english: You guys? How ridiculous. Besides, I don't exactly fight only Soul Junk, you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_99.korean: 당신들이? 우습군요.&n게다가 저는 딱히 소울정크와만 싸우지 않는 답니다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_10.english: Hmm... but Mr. Nev, are you really okay? If 'that kid' sees this, it looks like it's going to get quite noisy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_10.korean: 흠… 그런데 네브 씨, 정말 괜찮은 겁니까?&n만약 '그 아이'가 보면 꽤 시끄러워질 것 같은데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_100.english: Have you run out of things to say already?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_101.english: Lily, may I ask you just one thing?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_101.korean: 릴리 님, 한 가지만 여쭤도 될까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_102.english: Yes, please do as you please.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_103.english: Do you… think you are alone?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_104.english: I wondered what kind of question you were going to ask…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_105.english: As you can see, I am alone. Because, like you, there is no one to spend my life with, nor anyone to die with... 'right now'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_105.korean: 보시다시피, 저는 혼자입니다.&n당신처럼 평생을 함께할 이도, 죽음을 같이할 이도… ‘지금은’ 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_106.english: That's enough. Let's end this trivial conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_107.english: Ah, if you want a fight…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_109.english: Thank you for your hard work.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_110.english: For now, it seems we have no choice but to continue the conversation and wait. If you are a Desire Worker, surely you must have at least one desire of your own.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_110.korean: 지금은 대화를 이어가며 기다릴 수밖에 없을 것 같습니다.&n데자이어 워커라면 분명, 자신만의 욕망이 하나쯤은 있을 테지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_111.english: That… I can’t be sure yet, but I think it will be different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_111.korean: 그건… 아직 확신할 순 없지만, 저는 다를 거라 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_112.english: Anyway, thank you for your hard work. Please leave this to me and get some rest, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_112.korean: 아무튼, 수고 많으셨습니다.&n여기는 저에게 맡기고 사령관님은 편히 쉬시기 바랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_119.english: Yes, Lily and I look alike.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_12.english: You say it's going to be quite noisy? Are you talking about me?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_12.korean: 꽤 시끄러울 거라니? 지금 날 두고 하는 소리야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_120.english: To be precise... it resembles another Eternity, not me...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_120.korean: 정확히는... 제가 아닌, 다른 이터니티와 닮았습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_122.english: I have never seen it firsthand, but I know the end that the Eternities met before the apocalypse.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_122.korean: 직접 본 적은 없지만, 멸망전의 이터니티들이 맞이했던 최후를 저는 알고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_123.english: Yes. But that isn't all. I know of another ending as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_123.korean: 네. 하지만 그것만이 아니에요.&n저는 또 다른 최후도 알고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_125.english: This is the end of the Eternities who survived, unable to protect their master or even enter the coffin with him.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_125.korean: 주인을 지켜내지 못하고, 함께 관에 들어가지도 못한 채… 살아남아 버린 이터니티들의 최후입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_128.english: Are you really sure that method is okay?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_13.english: Oops, speak of the devil and he appears...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_13.korean: 어이쿠, 호랑이도 제 말 하면 온다더니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_132.english: Did you sleep well last night?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_133.english: You know this well, don't you? For workers, 'deep sleep' is just a choice.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_133.korean: 당신도 잘 알지 않나요?&n워커들에게 ‘숙면’은 그저 선택일 뿐이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_134.english: You didn't come just to check on me, did you? What do you want?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_134.korean: 안부나 확인하기 위해 찾아온 건 아닐 테지요?&n무슨 용무시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_136.english: If you want… I’ll fight for you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_15.english: You've brought something impressive again, Mr. Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_15.korean: 또 대단한 걸 들고 오셨네요. 테네브리스 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_17.english: Iris, I know what you're trying to say, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_17.korean: 이리스, 무슨 말을 하고 싶은지는 알겠지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_18.english: No need for lengthy explanations. I have already held back many times, so Tenebris, you would do well to act cautiously as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_18.korean: 긴 말은 필요 없어요. 이미 여러 번 참았으니까,&n테네브리스, 당신도 신중히 행동하는 게 좋을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_19.english: Desire Walker is also a human being after all, and is just a victim of this void.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_19.korean: 데자이어 워커도 결국은 사람이고, 이 공백의 피해자일 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_2.english: You have returned safely. You have worked hard, Commander. And you too, Eternity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_2.korean: 무사히 돌아왔군요. 고생 많으셨습니다, 사령관 씨. 그리고 이터니티 씨도.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_20.english: So, are you saying that being a victim gives you a free pass to kill people to your heart's content?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_20.korean: 피해자면 뭐, 사람들을 마음껏 죽여도 면죄부를 쥐여준다는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_21.english: I absolutely cannot accept that logic.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_21.korean: 그런 논리라면 절대 받아들일 수 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_22.english: Iris… these people didn’t come in here and kill people of their own free will.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_22.korean: 이리스… 이 사람들은 스스로 원해서 여기에 들어와 사람을 죽인 게 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_23.english: You know the saying that a dog that has bitten a person and tasted blood must be slaughtered immediately, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_23.korean: 한 번 사람을 물고 피맛을 본 개는 바로 도살당해야 한다는 말, 아시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_24.english: Don't say that. Humans aren't dogs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_24.korean: 그렇게 말하지 마. 인간은 개가 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_25.english: I don't consider things like Desire to be human.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_25.korean: 전 데자이어 같은 걸 인간이라고 생각하지 않거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_28.english: Whoa, whoa! Why are you trying to fight again!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_28.korean: 워, 워! 왜 또 싸우려는 겁니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_3.english: Oh, Mr. Nev? You didn't say anything about my hard work?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_3.korean: 어라, 네브 씨? 저한테는 고생했다는 말이 없네요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_30.english: If this isn't a fight, then what is it! Yuma, please just quietly follow the adults' judgment for now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_30.korean: 지금 이게 싸우는 게 아니면 뭡니까!&n유마 씨, 지금은 조용히 어른들의 판단을 따라주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_31.english: So you call them adults... and since I'm powerless and young, you're telling me to just endure whatever and keep my eyes closed?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_31.korean: 어른들이라…&n내가 힘이 없고 어리니까 뭐든 참으면서 눈 감고 있으라 이거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_32.english: Yes! Because at least I can make more level-headed judgments than you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_32.korean: 네! 적어도 당신보다는 좀 더 냉정한 판단을 할 수 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_33.english: It’s not for nothing that I’m living a few more years.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_33.korean: 괜히 몇 년 더 살고 있는 게 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_34.english: They always just say they'll handle it themselves...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_34.korean: 언제나 그렇게 어른들이 알아서 한다고만 말하고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_35.english: I know exactly what you're worried about. I'll take full responsibility for bringing him here, so I hope you'll watch over him for a little while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_35.korean: 네가 뭘 걱정하는지는 나도 잘 알아.&n데려온 만큼 책임도 확실하게 질 테니까 조금은 지켜봐 줬으면 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_36.english: Mr. Nev! Isn't it because you always speak so weakly that they keep attacking you like this?! Try getting a little firmer and angry once in a while!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_36.korean: 네브 씨! 언제나 그렇게 약하게 말하니까 이런 식으로 계속 덤벼드는 거 아닙니까!&n가끔씩은 좀 단호하게 화를 내 보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_4.english: If I do this, it really makes me look like I didn't do anything!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_4.korean: 이러면 정말 제가 아무것도 안 한 사람 같잖습니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_40.english: Mr. Nev, if you leave him like that, he's going to cause a really big accident. Really, whatever it may be.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_40.korean: 네브 씨, 저대로 두면 정말 큰 사고를 칠 겁니다.&n정말로 뭐가 됐든 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_41.english: Things are already tough enough, so there is no need for us to start a fight among ourselves. We should accept that child's opinion as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_41.korean: 안 그래도 힘든 때인데, 우리끼리 싸움 벌일 필요는 없어.&n저 아이의 의견도 받아들여야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_42.english: Hmm... I'm a little uneasy, but I understand.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_43.english: Then I will be going as well. You will have to think carefully about the problem, Yuma.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_43.korean: 그럼 저도 가보겠습니다.&n유마 씨 문제는 잘 생각해 보셔야 할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_46.english: I'm sorry. I've shown you an unsightly side of myself.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_47.english: Sometimes I have absolutely no idea what to do.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_47.korean: 가끔은 뭘 어떻게 해야 할지 전혀 모르겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_48.english: There are times when I even doubt if I am doing it right.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_48.korean: 제가 제대로 하고 있는 건지조차 의심스러울 때가 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_49.english: If I waver, everyone… becomes anxious too…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_51.english: Thanks to you, I feel like my eyes are opening a little. You are truly the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_51.korean: 덕분에 눈이 조금 뜨이는 것 같습니다. 역시 사령관님이시군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_52.english: I will now confine this child in a place where they will not be harmed by others.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_52.korean: 이제 이 아이를, 다른 사람들에게 피해 주지 않을 장소에 구속해 두겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_53.english: Understood. Then I will let you know after the maintenance is finished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_53.korean: 알겠습니다.&n그럼 정비가 끝난 뒤에 안내해 드리죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_56.english: He must have regained consciousness by now. I have restrained him so he cannot move for now... please be careful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_56.korean: 지금쯤이면 정신을 차렸을 겁니다.&n일단 움직이지 못하게 구속해 두었지만… 아무쪼록 조심해 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_59.english: Will you be entering with Ms. Eternity as well?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_6.english: No, why are you saying such hurtful things! You have to tell me how hard I've been cheering for Miss Eternity!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_6.korean: 아니, 무슨 말씀을 그렇게 섭섭하게 하십니까!&n제가 이터니티 양을 얼마나 열심히 응원했는데요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_60.english: Yes. I will be with you wherever you are, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_60.korean: 네. 주인님이 계시는 곳이라면 어디든 함께할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_61.english: … Understood. With Miss Eternity, there shouldn't be any major problems.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_62.english: Then, I will open the door.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_64.english: I expected it, but... the wounds have all healed. Not only the broken arm, but even all the hair that was cut off...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_64.korean: 예상은 했지만… 상처는 전부 나았군요.&n부러졌던 팔은 물론, 잘려나갔던 머리칼까지 전부…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_65.english: I can't be certain, but the possibility is high. The younger you are, the easier it is to be swayed by emotions, and just as easily consumed by Desire energy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_65.korean: 확신할 순 없지만 가능성은 높습니다.&n나이가 어릴수록 감정에 휘둘리기 쉽고, 그만큼 데자이어 에너지에 잠식되기도 쉽지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_66.english: Anyway, starting now, I will have a conversation with this child—

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_67.english: I do not want to talk to a barbarian who stands and converses while a guest is sitting. I hope you go and learn your manners again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_67.korean: 손님을 앉혀놓고 서서 대화하는 야만인과는 이야기하고 싶지 않답니다.&n예절부터 다시 배우고 오시길 바랄게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_69.english: The commander over here is a very wise man. Let's at least talk a little.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_69.korean: 이쪽에 계신 사령관님은 굉장히 현명한 분입니다.&n이야기만이라도 조금 해 보시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_7.english: Okay, okay. You worked hard too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_70.english: Conversation is nothing but a hollow flow of sound. I don't need anything else, so why don't you just kill me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_70.korean: 대화란 건 그저 공허한 소리의 흐름일 뿐이랍니다.&n다른 건 필요 없으니 차라리 지금 당장 절 죽이시는 게 어떻습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_71.english: Now, as you can see, the wounds I sustained fighting you have already healed. You shouldn't let yourself be swept away by a ridiculous sense of justice and miss this opportunity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_71.korean: 자, 보시다시피 당신들과 싸워 입었던 상처는 이미 다 나았습니다.&n시답잖은 정의감에 휩쓸려 이런 기회를 놓치시면 안 되죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_72.english: Life is worthless to me. Of course, the same goes for your lives. Now then, go ahead and kill me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_72.korean: 저에게 목숨 따위는 가치가 없답니다.&n물론, 당신들의 목숨도 마찬가지지요.&n자, 그러니 어서 죽이시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_77.english: If you wish to converse with a noble, you should show proper etiquette. I have lived in a household where I was kicked out over the placement of a single piece of tableware.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_77.korean: 귀족과 대화를 원한다면, 응당한 예법을 보이시죠.&n저는 식기 하나 놓는 위치 때문에 내쫓기던 집안에서 살아왔답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_78.english: If not, then why don't you try barking like beasts? Doesn't that suit you, who futilely cling to life in a moldy basement like this?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_78.korean: 그게 아니라면 차라리 짐승처럼 짖어보시던지요.&n이런 곰팡이 핀 지하실에서 부질없이 목숨을 연명하는 당신들에겐 어울리지 않습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_79.english: Now, go ahead and kill me. Otherwise, I will escape this place and kill everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_79.korean: 자, 어서 죽이시죠.&n그렇지 않으면 제가 이곳을 빠져나가 모두 죽여버리겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_8.english: He has not regained consciousness yet.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_80.english: I really don't understand why they want to fight to this extent...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_80.korean: 대체 왜 이렇게까지 싸우기를 원하는지 모르겠군요…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_84.english: It's you again. Well, actually, if it were a maid, she might at least observe some basic etiquette.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_84.korean: 또 당신이군요.&n뭐, 오히려 메이드라면 최소한의 예법은 지킬지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_85.english: My name is Eternity. Nice to meet you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_88.english: Lily... do you want to fight?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_89.english: Is there a special reason to stop living?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_89.korean: 살아있는 걸 멈추는 데에 특별한 이유가 필요할까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_90.english: I can sense the image of 'death' in you as well.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_91.english: Yes. Because I am a being designed to spend my entire life with my Master and then enter the same coffin to end my life.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_91.korean: 네. 저는 주인님과 일생을 함께한 뒤, 같은 관에 들어가 삶을 마감하도록 설계된 존재니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_92.english: So someday when the time comes, I will accept death.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_92.korean: 그러니 언젠가 때가 오면, 죽음을 받아들일 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_93.english: A plan… I don’t know what that means, but if that man dies right here and now, what would you do?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_93.korean: 설계라… 무슨 뜻인지는 모르겠지만, 그렇다면 지금 이 자리에서 저 사내가 죽는다면 어떻게 하실 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_94.english: Are you going to take your own life right away, too?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_96.english: Hmph, how lame. I have been taught how to stand on my own with the pride of a noble since I was born.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_96.korean: 흥, 시시하군요.&n전 태어났을 때부터 귀족의 긍지를 가지고 자립하는 법을 배워왔습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_97.english: I took on the challenges, overcame the hardships, and achieved results, allowing me to smile alone at the highest point.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_97.korean: 어려움은 도전했고, 힘든 일은 극복했으며, 결과를 쟁취해 가장 높은 곳에서 홀로 웃을 수 있었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_98.english: Unlike you… I don’t hesitate for a moment. Did you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_98.korean: 당신과 달리… 조금의 망설임도 없습니다. 아셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_12.english: It was fun, just as I expected. It’s the first time I’ve ever had this much fun.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_12.korean: 역시 즐거웠어요. 이 정도로 즐거운 건 처음이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_13.english: It seems it wasn't just bluff after all. If only I could have moved a little faster, I could have fought longer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_13.korean: 과연 허세는 아니었던 모양이군요.&n제가 조금 더 빨리 움직일 수 있었더라면 더 싸울 수 있었을 텐데 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_14.english: I have no intention of acting pathetic after being defeated. Now, please take this useless life away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_14.korean: 패배한 주제에 구차해질 생각은 없답니다.&n자, 어서 이 부질없는 목숨을 가져가주시지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_15.english: Lily... are you really okay with that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_16.english: Ah. Another sermon? Your master is like that too; you really are very interested in other people's business.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_16.korean: 아아. 또 설교인가요?&n당신의 주인도 그렇고, 정말 남 일에 관심이 많군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_17.english: What I want is to fight the strong, so how many times do I have to tell you for you to understand?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_17.korean: 제가 원하는 건 강한 자와 싸우는 거라 몇 번을 말해야 이해하시는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_18.english: Stop spouting nonsense and just shoot.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_18.korean: 헛소리 지껄이지 말고 빨리 쏘기나 하시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_19.english: No, it's different. If I really wanted more fights, I wouldn't throw my life away like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_19.korean: 아니요 달라요.&n정말 더 많은 싸움을 원하신다면, 이렇게 목숨을 내던지지 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_2.english: That look in your eyes… I really like it! Have you finally thrown away that ridiculous manners?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_2.korean: 그 눈빛… 굉장히 마음에 드는군요!&n이제야 그 같잖은 예절을 집어던지신 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_22.english: Isn't that exactly Lily's true desire?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_22.korean: 그게 바로 릴리 님의 진짜 욕망이 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_25.english: I just fought. Fight, and fight, and fight again...
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_25.korean: 전 그저 싸웠을 뿐이에요. 싸우고, 싸우고 또 싸우고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_27.english: Isn't that about finding someone who can kill you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_27.korean: 그건, 자신을 죽일 수 있는 사람을 찾는 게 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_28.english: … Please don't interrupt me arbitrarily; it is rude.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_3.english: I really love it…! Let's enjoy this until I run out of breath!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_3.korean: 정말 마음에 들어요…! 숨이 끊어질 때까지 즐겨보도록 하죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_32.english: However, there is one exception. It is 'giving up one's life'... If that itself is desire, everything is explained. Lily simply... wanted to die.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_32.korean: - 하지만 한 가지 예외가 있다.&n바로 ‘목숨을 버리는 것’… 그 자체가 욕망이라면 모든 게 설명된다.&n릴리는 그저… 죽고 싶었던 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_33.english: The desire to die made my Desire Energy stronger, and to think that because it became stronger, I ended up with a body that cannot die easily… How cruel.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_33.korean: - 죽고 싶다는 욕망이 데자이어 에너지를 강하게 만들었고, 강해진 탓에 오히려 쉽게 죽을 수 없는 몸이 되어버리다니… 지독하군.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_34.english: Whatever it is, what do you intend to do about it? Is there anything that will change now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_34.korean: 뭐가 됐든, 어쩌겠다는 거죠?&n이제 와서 달라질 게 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_35.english: If you kill me, it's over; otherwise, a new slaughter will simply begin. Now is your chance. Hurry... kill me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_35.korean: 당신이 절 죽이면 끝, 그렇지 않으면 또 새로운 살육이 시작될 뿐.&n지금이 기회예요. 어서… 절 죽이시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_36.english: Lily, you are being drawn by your own power.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_36.korean: 릴리 님은 자신의 힘에 이끌리고 계시군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_37.english: It must be moving as a mass of madness, driven by an uncontrollable force that doesn't even allow for suicide.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_37.korean: 제어할 수 없는 힘으로 자살조차 허용되지 않은 채, 광기의 덩어리가 되어 움직이고 있는 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_38.english: That is why you are looking for someone who can overcome even your own madness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_38.korean: 그렇기 때문에 자신의 광기조차 이길 수 있는 사람을 찾고 계신 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_39.english: Shut your mouth and kill me quickly…!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_4.english: Lily... do you really not know why you are fighting?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_4.korean: 릴리 님은… 정말 자신이 싸우는 이유를 모르시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_41.english: There's nothing left in this world anyway! The things I want aren't here anymore!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_41.korean: 어차피 이 세상에 남은 건 없어!&n내가 원하는 것들은 더 이상 여기에 없다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_42.english: Rather than living in a place like this… I’d rather go over there! To a place with more!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_42.korean: 이딴 곳에 사느니 차라리… 저쪽으로 가야 해! 더 많은 게 있는 곳으로!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_43.english: So stop talking nonsense and kill me! I've killed countless people! What right does a murderer like this have to live?! You all hate me, don't you?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_43.korean: 그러니까 잔말 말고 빨리 죽여! 난 수많은 사람을 죽였어!&n이런 살인마가 살 가치가 어디 있겠어?! 너희 모두 날 미워하고 있잖아?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_46.english: The old me would have answered 'yes' without hesitation. But now it's different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_46.korean: 예전의 저라면 망설임 없이 ‘네’라고 대답했을 거예요.&n하지만 지금은 달라요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_48.english: If my master passes away, I will definitely be very sad. I will probably shed a lot of tears, too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_48.korean: 주인님이 돌아가신다면 저는 분명 엄청 슬플 거예요. 눈물도 많이 흘리겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_49.english: But I won't take my own life.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_49.korean: 하지만 스스로 목숨을 끊지는 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_50.english: Because that is the only repayment I, who am left behind, can give to my master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_50.korean: 그게 남겨진 제가 주인님께 드릴 수 있는 유일한 보답이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_52.korean: 아니야… 난 그런 거 필요 없어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_53.korean: 혼자 살아남는 건 아무 의미도 없다고!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_54.english: Why?! Why did my brother have to die?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_54.korean: 왜죠?! 어째서 오라버니가 죽어야 했던 거죠?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_55.english: Why did I have to be eaten by a beast?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_58.english: If not, just kill me instead!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_59.english: I'm saying please let me meet my older brother!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_59.korean: 오라버니를 만날 수 있게 해달란 말이에요!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_6.english: We are simply fighting each other, risking our lives.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_6.korean: 저희는 그저 서로 자신의 목숨을 걸고 싸울 뿐이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_62.english: It ended more anticlimactically than expected.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_63.english: If my prediction were correct, Mr. Nev should have subdued Miss Lily here.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_63.korean: 제 예상대로라면, 여기서는 네브 씨가 릴리 양을 제압했어야 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_64.english: Of course, Mr. Nev wouldn't kill Miss Lily for such a trivial reason.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_64.korean: 물론 네브 씨가 시답잖은 이유로 릴리 양을 죽일 리는 없겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_65.english: If that had been the case, Miss Lily's desire to die would have grown stronger, and that desire would have awakened even more Desire Energy…
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_65.korean: 그랬다면 릴리 양의 죽고 싶다는 욕망은 더 강해지고, 그 욕망이 더 많은 데자이어 에너지를 불러일으켰을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_66.english: However, if things continue like this, that desire might actually disappear.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_66.korean: 하지만 이대로라면, 오히려 그 욕망이 사라져버릴지도 모르겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_68.english: Commander, isn't this going a bit too far?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_68.korean: 사령관 씨. 이건 조금 도가 지나친 게 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_69.english: I intended to just watch and not necessarily get involved in this matter, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_69.korean: 이번 일에는 굳이 개입하지 않고 지켜보려 했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_70.english: Now that things have turned out this way... I guess it can't be helped.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_70.korean: 이렇게 된 이상… 어쩔 수 없겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_8.english: Then I will treat you with all my heart.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_9.english: Hahaha, alright! Then, shall we begin? The deadly mist that takes each other's lives!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_9.korean: 후후후, 좋아요! 그럼 시작해 볼까요?&n서로의 목숨을 빼앗는 죽음의 연무를!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_11.english: … Are you saying you’ll feel sorry for me after hearing that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_12.english: Pouring your emotions into a beast only brings back cold claws that tear through your veins, you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_12.korean: 짐승에게 감정을 쏟아봐야 돌아오는 건 혈관을 찢는 차가운 발톱뿐이랍니다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_13.english: Hmph... well, in that case, let me explain.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_15.english: I don't know how many times I've told you that I just want to fight.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_15.korean: 단지 싸우고 싶을 뿐이라고 몇 번을 말씀드렸는지 모르겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_17.english: … We are about to engage in a life-or-death battle, so we don't have the luxury to talk about such things.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_17.korean: …곧 죽고 죽이는 싸움을 벌일 텐데, 그런 얘기를 나눌 여유는 없답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_18.english: Ugh… Is that how you’re going to play it? Hmph… Well, it would be troublesome if I refused and you ended up changing your mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_18.korean: 윽… 그렇게 나오시나요?&n흥… 뭐, 제가 거절하다 끝내 당신이 마음을 바꾸기라도 하면 곤란하긴 하겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_19.english: Alright. I’ll keep you company for a moment on my way. What is it that you are so curious about?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_19.korean: 좋아요. 걸어가는 길에 잠시 상대해 드리죠.&n제 무엇이 그렇게 궁금하신지요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_21.english: Hmph, it doesn't really matter if you don't know.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_22.english: I have no intention of being understood by others. Because, to be honest, I don't really know either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_22.korean: 남에게 이해받을 생각은 없답니다.&n저도 사실 잘 모르니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_23.english: All I remember is… that scene where the monsters were devouring the flesh of my precious family.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_23.korean: 그저 기억하는 건… 괴물들이 소중한 가족의 살점을 파먹고 있었던 그 장면뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_24.english: Amidst the mix of anger and disgust, when I smashed the monster's head with a golf club... I was seized by an inexplicable sense of liberation and couldn't stop myself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_24.korean: 분노와 혐오가 한데 뒤섞인 와중에, 그 괴물의 머리를 골프채로 짓뭉갰을 때…&n알 수 없는 해방감에 사로잡혀 몸을 멈출 수 없었답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_25.english: - … I lost my family because of the blank space. It's similar to Haru.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_27.english: You have got it wrong. Revenge for my family means nothing to me anymore. I am simply looking for a stronger opponent.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_27.korean: 잘못 짚으셨군요.&n제게 가족의 복수 따위는 이제 아무 의미도 없어요.&n저는 그저 더 강한 상대를 찾을 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_28.english: Well, even if I did know, I wouldn't want to tell you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_28.korean: 글쎄요.&n안다고 해도 당신에겐 말하고 싶지 않군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_3.english: I have arrived. If it is a park on the inside, I won't be disturbed by anyone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_3.korean: 도착했습니다.&n안쪽에 있는 공원이라면 누구에게도 방해받지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_35.english: I've said all this, so you wouldn't bring up the idea of ​​not fighting now, would you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_35.korean: 이렇게까지 말했는데 이제 와서 싸우지 않겠다는 말은 꺼내지 않으시겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_36.english: Trust? It's not like that. I don't trust others that easily.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_36.korean: 신뢰? 그런 건 아닙니다.&n전 타인을 그렇게 쉽게 믿지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_37.english: I wasted time on something useless. That is really the end of our conversation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_37.korean: 쓸데없는 일에 시간을 할애했군요.&n대화는 이제 정말로 여기까지입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_38.english: It seems you still have more to say, but I will not answer you now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_38.korean: 아직 하실 말씀이 더 남아 있으신 것 같지만, 이제 대답해드리지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_39.english: Isn't it your maid, not you, who is fighting with me in the first place? Since I have engaged in this much conversation even though I am not the party involved... I suppose my duties as a noble are sufficient now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_39.korean: 애초에 저와 싸우는 건 당신이 아니라, 당신의 메이드 아닌가요?&n당사자도 아니면서 이 정도 담소를 나눠드렸으니… 귀족으로서의 책무는 이제 충분하겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_40.english: Whatever the case, I never want to run into you again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_40.korean: 무엇이 되었든, 저는 이제 다시는 당신과 마주치고 싶지 않군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_45.english: - Could it be… Lily’s true desire is…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_46.english: Come to think of it, I don't understand, Maid.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_46.korean: 그러고 보니 이해가 되지 않는군요, 메이드 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_49.english: … Hmph, well, I suppose it doesn't matter.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_5.english: Master, then I will be going.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_50.english: After all, you fighting me is likely your master's order.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_50.korean: 어차피 당신이 나와 싸우는 건 주인의 명령일 테니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_53.english: I am not fighting with Lily because of my master's orders.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_53.korean: 제가 릴리 님과 싸우는 건 주인님의 명령 때문이 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_54.english: I am fighting of my own free will.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_56.english: Hahaha… Hahahaha! Ahahahahaha!! Good! That’s exactly it! That’s how it should be!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_56.korean: 후후… 후후후! 아하하하하하!!&n좋습니다! 바로 그거예요! 그렇게 나와야지요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_57.english: In that case, I should repay you as well!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_6.english: It's okay. You can fight well enough on your own.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_7.english: That is an incredible display of confidence, completely devoid of any consideration for the listener. However, I actually like it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_7.korean: 듣는 이에 대한 배려라곤 전혀 없는 대단한 자신감이군요.&n하지만 전, 오히려 마음에 듭니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_8.english: Now, let's ignore this person and move on quickly. I wonder how long you can keep that bravado going... I'd like to watch.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_8.korean: 자, 이런 사람은 무시하고 빨리 앞으로 가지요.&n과연 당신이 언제까지 그 허세를 이어갈 수 있을지… 지켜보고 싶군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_9.english: Isn't that enough of a story? I have nothing more to say.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_9.korean: 이야기라면 이제 충분하지 않나요?&n더는 드릴 말씀이 없습니다만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_10.english: … Lil, I have something I want to tell you today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_10.korean: …릴, 오늘은 너에게 하고 싶은 말이 있구나.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_102.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_109.english: Start collecting clear data for the fourth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_109.korean: 네 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_110.english: Player Commander, I hope you stay strong.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_12.english: As your older brother, I am truly happy that you always trust and rely on me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_12.korean: 네가 늘 나를 믿고 의지해주는 건 오빠로서 정말 기쁘단다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_13.english: Having a younger sister to be proud of is also my pride as an older brother.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_13.korean: 자랑스러운 여동생을 둔 게 오빠의 자랑이기도 하고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_14.english: But… on the other hand, I’m worried about whether you’ll be okay when I’m not around.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_14.korean: 하지만… 한편으로는 내가 없을 때 네가 괜찮을지, 걱정이 된다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_16.english: Lil… my proud little sister. You are not alone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_16.korean: 릴… 나의 자랑스러운 여동생아.&n너는 혼자가 아니라는 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_17.english: Someday, someone will definitely appear to protect you and stand by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_17.korean: 언젠가 너를 지켜주고, 네 곁에 함께 서줄 사람이 반드시 나타날 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_18.english: If you can open your heart to that person, you will surely be able to move forward more brightly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_18.korean: 그 사람에게 마음을 열 수 있다면, 너는 분명 더 밝게 앞으로 나아갈 수 있을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_19.english: Could there really be such a person?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_2.english: Are you talking about the one that appeared around here? … Well, I'm not sure yet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_2.korean: 이 근방에서 나타났다는 그거 말씀인가요? …글쎄요, 아직은 잘 모르겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_20.english: … I understand. If someone like that appears in front of me…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_21.english: I will move forward as you said, brother.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_22.english: Lord Tenebris, the cleanup of the Soul Junk corpses from the last raid is almost finished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_22.korean: 테네브리스 님.&n지난번 습격했던 소울정크의 시체 정리가 거의 끝났습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_24.english: It is a great relief that there was no major damage.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_25.english: To think there was only one victim despite so many Soul Junk swarming in… it is a miracle. It is all thanks to Lady Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_25.korean: 그렇게 많은 소울정크가 몰려왔는데 희생자가 단 한 명뿐이라니… 기적입니다.&n모두 테네브리스 님 덕분입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_27.english: Oh, I'm sorry. Regardless, someone lost their life... I was too thoughtless.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_27.korean: 앗, 죄송합니다.&n뭐가 됐든 목숨을 잃은 사람이 있는데… 제가 너무 경솔했군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_28.english: No, it is true that it is fortunate the damage was limited to this extent.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_28.korean: 아닙니다.&n이 정도 피해로 그친 게 다행이라는 건 사실이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_3.english: More importantly, Brother. How is the black tea today?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_3.korean: 그보다, 오라버니. 오늘 홍차 맛은 어떠신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_36.english: So you came back carried on my shoulder again. And you're covered in wounds all over your body, just like last time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_36.korean: 또 그렇게 어깨에 메여 돌아오셨군요.&n온몸에 상처투성이인 것도 지난번이랑 똑같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_39.english: … Anyway, it is a relief to see that the two of you seem to be getting closer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_39.korean: …아무튼, 두 분이 점점 가까워지는 것 같아 다행입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_4.english: Today… I didn’t have a maid make it; I brewed it myself… I hope it suits your taste.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_4.korean: 오늘은… 메이드가 아니라, 제가 직접 우려봤는데… 입에 맞으셨으면 좋겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_42.english: I don't remember becoming friends with you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_42.korean: 저는 당신과 친구가 된 기억은 없답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_45.english: That is something you decided on your own…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_47.english: Seriously… do you… have no awareness that you are being a nuisance?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_47.korean: 정말이지… 당신이란 사람은…&n민폐라는 자각이 없는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_51.english: Excuse me, Mr. Eternity... are you alright?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_52.english: Thank you for your concern. But I'm fine.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_53.english: The fact that I couldn't protect it even though it was right in front of me... is my fault.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_53.korean: 눈앞에 있었음에도 지켜내지 못한 건... 제 불찰이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_54.english: I see... I hope you don't worry too much about it. I am sorry that I can only say this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_54.korean: 그렇군요… 너무 마음을 쓰지 않으셨으면 합니다.&n이런 말씀밖에 드릴 수 없어 죄송하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_57.english: Haa... Well then, since I’ve finished the task I was asked to do, I’ll be going now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_57.korean: 하아… 그럼 부탁받은 일도 끝냈으니 저는 이만 가보겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_60.english: … By the way, aren't you concerned about Eternity?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_61.english: Which part are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_62.english: Aren't the two of you very close? But Ms. Lily…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_62.korean: 두 분은 매우 친한 사이가 아닌가요?&n그런데 릴리 씨가…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_63.english: This is pretty normal for you, Master.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_7.english: Ahaha... all the practice paid off!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_71.english: Considering you were once inside a Soul Junk... you look more intact than I expected.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_71.korean: 한 번 소울정크의 뱃속에 들어갔던 것치고는… 생각보다 멀쩡해 보이네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_72.english: Well, fine. I came today for a separate matter.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_72.korean: 뭐, 좋아요.&n오늘은 따로 용건이 있어서 왔답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_73.english: I happened to get my hands on some good black tea.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_74.english: How about having some tea with me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_74.korean: 어떠세요, 지금 저와 함께 티타임을 가져보시는 건?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_77.english: … Is that so? It would have been nice if there had been some snacks to go with the black tea. That's a shame.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_77.korean: …그런가요.&n홍차와 곁들일 다과라도 있었으면 좋았을 텐데, 아쉽군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_8.english: Could you ride with me often in the future?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_80.english: Really, you have no consideration for others.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_80.korean: 정말이지, 당신은 배려라는 게 없으신 분이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_81.english: Would you mind thinking a little before you speak?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_81.korean: 조금은 말하기 전에 생각이라는 걸 해보시는 게 어떠실지요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_82.english: My older brother always spoke to me so kindly... but you are so clumsy... Still, strangely enough, I don't dislike that clumsiness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_82.korean: 오라버니는 언제나 다정하게 말을 건네셨는데… 당신은 참 서툴군요…&n…그래도 그 서투름이 이상하게 싫지만은 않네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_83.english: It's okay, because I already know that you are that kind of person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_83.korean: 괜찮아요, 당신이 그런 사람이라는 건 이미 잘 알고 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_84.english: To answer your question… not now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_85.english: I'm telling you in advance so you don't misunderstand, it's not thanks to you, nor thanks to Miss Eternity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_85.korean: 오해하실까 봐 미리 말씀드리지만, 당신 덕분도, 이터니티 양 덕분도 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_86.english: It is simply… that old memories I had forgotten came to mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_86.korean: 그저… 잊고 있던 옛 기억이 떠올라서일 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_87.english: I mean a memory from a very long time ago.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_90.english: In that case… may I ask you one favor, for the first and last time?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_90.korean: 그렇다면… 처음이자 마지막으로 부탁 하나 해도 될까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_91.english: Just this once… would you call me 'Lil'?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_93.english: Put more emotion into it! Try again like a nobleman—kind, affectionate, and overflowing with dignity and elegance!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_93.korean: 좀 더 감정을 담아서!&n상냥하고 다정하고, 기품과 우아함이 넘치는 귀족처럼 다시 해보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_94.english: So… like a gentle, affectionate, and nobleman overflowing with dignity and elegance… with emotion…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_94.korean: - 그러니까… 상냥하고 다정하고 기품과 우아함이 넘치는 귀족처럼… 감정을 담아서…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_97.english: - … That laughter might be just a very small change.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_97.korean: - …그 웃음은 아주 작은 변화일 뿐인지도 모른다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_98.english: However, if that laughter continues, this girl will surely be able to move forward more brightly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_98.korean: - 하지만 그 웃음이 이어진다면, 이 소녀는 분명 더 밝게 나아갈 수 있을 것이다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_10.english: I've only talked about heavy topics.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_101.english: At that moment, a huge shadow was seen approaching from behind the commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_101.korean: 그 순간, 사령관의 등 뒤에서 거대한 그림자가 다가오는 것이 보였다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_102.english: Ah!! Soul Junk is behind me…! It’s dangerous!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_108.english: Spit it out! Spit it out quickly! I said spit that person out!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_108.korean: 뱉어내! 어서 뱉어내! 그 사람을 뱉어내란 말이야!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_109.english: I finally found you…! I finally found the person who should be by my side…!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_109.korean: 이제야 찾았는데…! 겨우 곁에 있을 사람을 찾았는데…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_11.english: Commander, it would be good for you to rest for a while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_11.korean: 사령관 씨는 잠시라도 쉬시는 게 좋겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_12.english: If you take on too much work at once, your body won't be able to handle it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_12.korean: 한 번에 너무 많은 일을 떠안으면 몸이 버티지 못할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_13.english: Please leave the rest to me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_15.english: I wish Lily could just get out of Desire without anything happening...
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_15.korean: - 이대로 아무 일 없이 릴리가 데자이어에서 벗어나면 좋겠는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_20.english: How long do you plan to stay in this spot?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_20.korean: 언제까지 이 자리에 붙어 있을 생각이죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_22.english: He didn't say a single word like that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_22.korean: 그런 말은 한 마디도 하지 않았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_24.english: … You must possess great insight. Of course, it looks completely useless, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_24.korean: …굉장한 통찰력을 지니셨나 보군요.&n물론 전혀 쓸모없어 보이지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_25.english: It doesn't look like he has any intention of going back.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_26.english: Or… did you receive an order from your master to stay by my side?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_26.korean: 아니면… 제 옆에 있으라는 주인의 명령이라도 받은 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_3.english: We haven't arrested them separately, but it looks like they will be quiet for the time being.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_3.korean: 따로 구속은 하지 않았습니다만, 당분간은 얌전할 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_31.english: Why is the story turning out that way?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_36.english: That's enough. I understand sufficiently just from that reaction.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_37.english: I haven't even told you all of your strengths yet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_37.korean: 아직 주인님의 장점을 다 말씀드린 것도 아닌데요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_38.english: It seems like there would be no end to listening to that, so I'll decline.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_38.korean: 그 얘기 듣다간 끝이 없을 것 같으니 사양할게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_39.english: In that case… what kind of person was Lily’s older brother?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_39.korean: 그렇다면… 릴리 님의 오라버니는 어떤 분이셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_4.english: I continue to stay by Miss Lily's side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_4.korean: 릴리 양 곁을 계속 지키고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_40.english: Why should I tell you that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_40.korean: 제가 왜 그걸 당신에게 말해야 하죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_41.english: So then, to tell you about your good points again, Master…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_41.korean: 그럼, 다시 주인님의 좋은 점을 말씀드리자면…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_43.english: My older brother is a much cooler person than your master. Are you satisfied?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_43.korean: 제 오라버니는 당신 주인보다 훨씬 멋지신 분이랍니다.&n만족하셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_45.english: … If I were to tell you about your good points, Master—

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_46.english: Ah...! Really...! I get it...! Why do we have to compete over something like this?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_46.korean: 아아…! 정말…! 알겠어요…!&n왜 이런 걸로 경쟁을 해야 하죠?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_47.english: I really feel like I become a fool when I'm with you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_47.korean: 정말 당신과 함께 있으면 저까지 바보가 되는 기분이에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_48.english: … My older brother was kinder than anyone, and more affectionate than anyone.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_49.english: And always… you smiled at me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_5.english: We don't really talk, but just having someone by your side makes a difference.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_5.korean: 딱히 대화를 나누지는 않지만, 누군가 곁에 있어주는 것만으로도 달라지는 게 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_50.english: My older brother was that kind of person.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_51.english: So, Lily liked your older brother.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_53.english: Loving your family is perfectly natural, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_53.korean: 가족을 좋아하는 건 극히 자연스러운 거잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_54.english: Besides… I was still young back then.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_55.english: You speak as if you are all grown up now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_55.korean: 마치 지금은 다 큰 것처럼 말씀하시네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_56.english: I don't want to hear it from you, at least!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_60.english: Draculina always speaks loudly in anger, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_60.korean: 드라큐리나는 늘 큰 목소리로 화를 내지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_61.english: I might actually get along quite well with that person, surprisingly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_61.korean: 그분과는 의외로 마음이 잘 맞을지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_66.english: Oh, by any chance, may I call you Lily?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_68.english: Hmm... I guess this should be enough.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_69.english: I might be going a bit overboard, but...

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_7.english: It will be okay. At least for now, they aren't saying "kill me" or "I will kill you."
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_7.korean: 괜찮아질 겁니다.&n적어도 지금은 ‘죽여 달라’거나 ‘죽이겠다’는 말은 하지 않고 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_70.english: Well, since Mr. Nev is here, things should work out somehow.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_70.korean: 뭐, 네브 씨가 있으니 어떻게든 되겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_74.english: Mr. Nev! This is a big problem!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_76.english: Yes! But… this is really… impossible to explain!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_76.korean: 네! 그런데… 이건 정말… 도저히 설명할 수가 없군요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_77.english: An absurd number of Soul Junk are swarming in!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_77.korean: 말도 안 되는 숫자의 소울정크가 몰려오고 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_78.english: Hurry and evacuate the camp! I'll hold them off so they can't get in!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_78.korean: 서둘러 캠프 사람들을 대피시켜!&n나는 놈들이 들어오지 못하게 막고 있을 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_8.english: It is hard to call it a good state, but you have likely gained time to reflect on yourself and think.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_8.korean: 좋은 상태라고 부르긴 어렵지만, 자신을 되돌아보고 생각할 시간은 생겼을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_88.english: To think he just talks about himself and disappears… I really don't understand what on earth is so good about a man like that…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_88.korean: 자기 말만 하고 사라지다니… 도대체 저런 남자의 어디가 좋다는 건지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_9.english: From now on, it will be up to Miss Lily's own choice.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_9.korean: 이제부터는 릴리 양 본인의 선택에 달렸겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_90.english: Is it, "Don't worry... just wait here"?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_93.english: Amidst the chaos swarming with Soul Junk, Lily was desperately searching for something while cutting down the charging beasts.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_93.korean: 소울정크가 들끓는 혼란 속에서, 릴리는 달려드는 짐승들을 베어 넘기며 무언가를 필사적으로 찾고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_95.english: Get out of the way, you bugs! I don't have time for people like you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_95.korean: 저리 비키세요 이 벌레들!&n당신들 따위에게 할애할 시간 따윈 없습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_96.english: Ugh, what on earth is this... this anxiety...? This isn't like me... What on earth is so special about a guy like that... to the point of going this far...
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_96.korean: 큭, 대체 뭐죠… 이 불안감은…?&n저답지 않아요… 그딴 사내가 대체 뭐라고… 이렇게까지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_98.english: Ah, that voice... it's from over there!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_12.english: Yes, there were some unusual circumstances, but there were no urgent issues.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_12.korean: 네, 특이사항은 있었지만 급한 문제는 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_13.english: I came here today because I heard the doctor is here.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_13.korean: 오늘은 닥터가 이곳에 있다고 해서 찾아왔습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_15.english: I have a question to ask. If it's not a bother...
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_15.korean: 조금 질문할 게 있어서요. 혹시 방해가 된다면…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_17.english: What is the question? If it's a long story, shall we go to my lab?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_17.korean: 무슨 질문인데? 긴 얘기면 내 연구실로 갈까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_18.english: No, it's fine. It won't take long. Besides, I have to report to the Commander on intelligence activities anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_18.korean: 아뇨, 괜찮아요. 오래 걸리진 않을 거예요.&n마침 사령관님에게 첩보 활동에 대한 보고도 해야 하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_19.english: … This is the report on recent intelligence activities.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_2.english: The device is causing significant changes to the data internally.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_2.korean: 장치 내부에서 자체적으로 데이터의 큰 변화를 일으키고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_25.english: Okay! I'll get it ready and wait!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_29.english: It seems you and the Commander have gotten along quite well since I last saw you, Doctor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_29.korean: 닥터는 잠깐 안 보는 사이 사령관님과 사이가 많이 좋아지셨군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_3.english: Yeah, it's probably due to the gameplay, but that doesn't mean you modified the data, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_3.korean: 응, 게임 플레이의 영향이겠지만 그렇다고 오빠가 데이터를 수정한 건 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_30.english: With you, Oppa? Hehehe~ I've been on good terms with you from the very beginning!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_30.korean: 오빠랑? 에헤헤~&n오빠 하고는 처음부터 사이가 좋았는 걸!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_32.english: - What is it...? I suddenly feel a cold stare coming from Shirayuri...
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_32.korean: - 뭐지…? 갑자기 시라유리에게서 싸늘한 시선이 느껴지는 것 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_35.english: - No, not yet... I can still get faster.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_35.korean: - 아니, 아직이야… 나는 아직 더 빨라질 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_36.english: At first, we could only process one case at a time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_36.korean: - 처음에는 한 건씩 밖에 처리할 수 없었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_37.english: However, as time went on, the amount that could be processed simultaneously increased to two or three.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_37.korean: - 하지만 시간이 지남에 따라 두 개, 세 개로 동시에 처리할 수 있는 양이 점점 늘어났다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_38.english: - Right now, I can handle about five cases simultaneously.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_38.korean: - 지금이라면 다섯 건 정도는 동시에 할 수 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_39.english: You might wonder how on earth you can do five at once, but anyway, it is five.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_39.korean: - 다섯 개를 동시에 라니 대체 어떻게 하는 건지 의문이 들 수 있지만, 어쨌든 다섯 개다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_4.english: It's not Azaz's fault. I even checked it properly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_4.korean: 아자즈 언니의 잘못은 아니야.&n내가 제대로 확인까지 했는 걸!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_40.english: - Someday, ten, a hundred, a thousand! I will be able to do everything simultaneously just as I think!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_40.korean: - 언젠가 열 개, 백 개, 천 개! 생각대로 모든 일을 동시에 할 수 있게 되겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_43.english: I headed to the server room to proceed with the fourth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_43.korean: - 네 번째 기록을 진행하기 위해 서버실로 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_44.english: To think it's already the fourth time... It wouldn't have been possible without everyone's help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_44.korean: - 어느새 벌써 네 번째라니… 모두의 도움이 없었다면 불가능했겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_45.english: Come to think of it, I need someone to play games with today… hmm…
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_45.korean: - 그러고 보니 오늘은 함께 게임 할 누군가가… 음...

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_46.english: No, it's getting late, so maybe I should handle it alone today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_46.korean: - 아니, 시간도 늦었으니 오늘은 혼자서 진행하는 게 좋으려나.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_5.english: Anyway, I think it would be a good idea to track what data changes going forward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_5.korean: 아무튼, 앞으로는 어떤 데이터가 변하는지 추적해 두는 게 좋을 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_50.english: Ah, Oppa! Welcome! I've been waiting for you!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_51.english: You're going to start right away, right?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_53.english: Then, first, I'll put this on my brother...

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_55.english: But aren't you doing this with another older sister today?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_55.korean: 그런데 오늘은 다른 언니랑 같이 안 하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_57.english: Hehehe~ So I'm getting you all to myself today, huh?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_57.korean: 에헤헤~ 그럼 오늘은 나 혼자서 오빠를 독차지 하는 거네?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_6.english: Yeah. But don't worry. There won't be any major problems playing just like you have so far.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_6.korean: 응. 그래도 걱정하지 마.&n지금까지처럼 플레이하는 데 큰 문제는 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_64.english: Doctor! What on earth are you doing!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_64.korean: 닥터! 지금 대체 뭘 하는 거예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_66.english: Uh...? Doctor... Commander... What are you doing?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_66.korean: 어…? 닥터… 사령관님… 지금 뭐 하시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_67.english: Huh? What do you mean, what am I doing? It's a game.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_69.english: Although he has been frequently away recently due to intelligence activities, to think of such a misconception…
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_69.korean: 최근들어 첩보 활동으로 자주 자리를 비웠다고는 하나 이런 착각을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_70.english: Normally I would have figured it out right away. It's pathetic.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_71.english: Oh my? Commander, do you think you are completely innocent?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_71.korean: 어머? 사령관님은 자신에게 아무런 죄가 없다고 생각하시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_72.english: I'm not entirely sure, but I'm glad the misunderstanding has been cleared up! By the way, what did Shirayuri-nee get into?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_72.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만 오해가 풀렸다면 다행이야!&n그런데 시라유리 언니는 무슨 착각을 한 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_75.english: More importantly… is this the virtual reality game device? It’s quite big.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_75.korean: 그보다… 이게 그 가상현실 게임 장치인가요?&n상당히 크네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_76.english: This is the first I’ve heard of it. There was some intelligence activity related to the game industry, but it wasn’t my primary area of ​​responsibility.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_76.korean: 처음 듣습니다.&n게임 업계와 관련한 첩보 활동도 있었지만, 제가 담당했던 주요 영역은 아니었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_77.english: I am sorry I couldn't be of help.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_78.english: That's right! Then how about this?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_8.english: I have already cleared three records, but I actually know almost nothing about this virtual reality game.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_8.korean: - 벌써 세 개의 기록을 클리어했지만, 사실 이 가상현실 게임에 대해 아는 건 거의 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_81.english: That way, it will be easier for you to clear it, and I feel relieved having you by my side!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_81.korean: 그 편이 오빠도 클리어하기 더 수월할 거고, 나도 언니가 옆에 있으면 안심돼!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_83.english: Hehe, it’s been a really long time since I’ve taken on a stealth mission.
