LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_83.korean: 후후, 정말 오랜만의 맡는 잠입 임무네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_85.english: I am Shirayuri from Agency 080. I will now begin the mission with the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_85.korean: 080기관 소속 시라유리, 지금부터 사령관님과 함께 임무를 시작하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_86.english: There was a minor incident, but the fourth record began with Shirayuri.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_86.korean: - 작은 해프닝이 있었지만, 네 번째 기록은 시라유리와 함께 시작되었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_9.english: It would be nice if I could know even a little bit about the creator.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_9.korean: - 제작자의 대한 정보를 조금이라도 알 수 있다면 좋을 텐데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_11.english: Miss Iris! Stop it! I really didn't mean to do that to Mr. Tenebris!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_11.korean: 이리스 양! 그만하세요!&n테네브리스 씨에게는 정말로 그럴 생각이 없었어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_12.english: Are you defending her again? Yeah, it's always like that, isn't it? You're just busy making me out to be the bad guy, aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_12.korean: 넌 또 저걸 감싸고 도는 거야?&n그래, 항상 그런식이지? 나만 나쁜년 만들기 바쁘지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_13.english: You're just like them! Do you end up looking alike if you hang out together?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_13.korean: 너도 저것들이랑 똑같아!&n같이 어울리고 다니면 서로 닮기라도 하나봐?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_14.english: ...This is the final warning. Please stop.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_15.english: Why? If you don't stop, are you going to hit me? Hit me! I said hit me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_15.korean: 왜? 그만 안 하면 치기라도 할 거야?&n쳐봐! 쳐보라고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_18.english: Miss Iris... I'm disappointed in you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_19.english: They don't think about others at all, only about themselves.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_19.korean: 남의 생각은 하나도 안 하고 자기 생각만 하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_2.english: Calm down! Iris… This isn't my doing…
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_2.korean: 진정해! 이리스…&n이건 내가 한 짓이 아니야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_20.english: Do you know how much everyone is agonizing over how to be with you, despite your self-centeredness?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_20.korean: 모두가 제멋대로인 당신과 어떻게 해서든 함께하기 위해 얼마나 많은 고민을 하고 있는지 알고 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_21.english: Your current behavior is no different from that of a trashy thug.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_21.korean: 지금 당신의 행동은 쓰레기 양아치와 다를 바가 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_22.english: Trash…? You said…? Don't make me laugh...! You guys are the trash for making me trash!! You sons of bitches!!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_22.korean: 쓰레기…? 쓰레기라고…? 웃기지 마...!&n날 쓰레기로 만들어낸 니들이 쓰레기야!! 이 개 같은 자식들아!!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_23.english: You all…! Every single one of you…!! I’ll kill you!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_3.english: Don't pretend you don't know, you disgusting bastard! Just say you wanted to kill me instead!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_3.korean: 모르는 척 하지마 역겨운 개자식아!&n차라리 날 죽이고 싶었다고 해!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_4.english: I should have realized it from the moment you suddenly changed your attitude. I was foolish to trust you even a little!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_4.korean: 네가 갑자기 태도를 바꿨을 때부터 눈치챘어야 했어.&n널 조금이라도 믿는 내가 어리석었지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_5.english: You're seriously mistaken about something... so... please listen to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_5.korean: 뭔가 단단히 착각하고 있다고… 그러니까… 제발 내 말 좀 들어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_6.english: A misunderstanding? Are you planning to dismiss this as a misunderstanding?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_7.english: They're already dead. They all died because of you!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_7.korean: 이미 죽었어. 다 너 때문에 죽었다고!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_8.english: You dug a trap and killed him, didn't you? I know everything.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_8.korean: 네가 함정을 파서 죽인거잖아.&n난 다 알고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_10.english: Don't get the wrong idea. I'm just going to gather the necessary supplies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_10.korean: 착각하지 마.&n어디까지나 필요한 물자를 챙기러 가는 거니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_100.english: It's just that things aren't going well right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_100.korean: 지금은 단지 그게 잘 안 풀리고 있을 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_101.english: Commander, isn't that why you are helping Mr. Tenebris?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_101.korean: 사령관님도 그걸 아시기에 테네브리스 씨의 옆에서 도와주고 계신 게 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_102.english: Then that is the problem. Just because things aren't going well, they don't do anything properly and are only busy stepping in.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_102.korean: 그럼 그게 문제지.&n잘 안 풀린다고 해서 제대로 하는 것도 없고 나서기만 바쁘고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_103.english: If you aren't even confident enough to act like a commanding leader, you should just stay quiet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_103.korean: 명령하는 리더 짓거리조차 자신 없으면 그냥 가만히 짜져있어야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_104.english: … If even we don't understand their efforts, who will? Wouldn't that be the only way to achieve good results?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_104.korean: …저희라도 그 노력을 이해해주지 않으면 누가 알아주겠어요.&n그래야 좋은 결과도 나올 수 있지 않겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_105.english: Then what if someone comes along who puts in the effort and produces results? If another leader emerges, you wouldn't have anything to say, would you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_105.korean: 그럼 노력도 하고 결과도 내는 사람이 나오면 어때?&n또 다른 리더가 나온다면 너도 할 말은 없겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_106.english: What? Well... that would be only natural if someone emerged whom everyone acknowledged, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_106.korean: 네? 그건 그야… 모두가 인정할 정도의 사람이 나온다면 당연하겠습니다만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_107.english: Good, you said it clearly with your own mouth. You said you would obey someone better than that idiot if they appeared.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_107.korean: 좋아, 네 입으로 확실히 말했다.&n그 멍청이보다 나은 사람이 나오면 그 사람한테 복종하겠다고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_108.english: Was that what you were talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_109.english: And I said I would obey—

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_110.english: Well, just wait and see. I’ll be the one to take away that Tenebris bubble myself soon.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_110.korean: 뭐, 두고 봐.&n곧 내가 그 테네브리스의 거품을 직접 거둬 낼 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_112.english: Fortunately, we made it into the department store without any major problems. Let's just grab our supplies and head out.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_112.korean: 다행히 큰 문제 없이 백화점에 들어왔군.&n이대로 물자만 챙겨서 나가자.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_114.english: It would have been faster if I had just smashed it up earlier, so I wasted time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_114.korean: 진작 때려 부수고 왔으면 더 빨랐을 텐데 시간 낭비한 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_115.english: Everything worked out well, so there's no need to be negative, right? Let's keep going strong until the end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_115.korean: 전부 잘 풀렸으니 부정적일 필요는 없잖아요?&n이대로 마지막까지 힘내보죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_116.english: Right, we have to make sure we get what we need. We'll use what I packed as promised, so don't complain.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_116.korean: 그래, 챙길 건 챙겨야지.&n약속한 대로 내가 챙긴 건 우리가 쓸 테니까 불평하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_117.english: That's fine. ...But there's something I'd like to talk to you about for a moment. Could you spare some time?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_117.korean: 그건 괜찮아.&n…대신 잠시 하고 싶은 이야기가 있는데, 시간 좀 내줄 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_118.english: Conversation? You're just getting in the way, so why don't you just quit?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_119.english: It really won't take long. You can consider this the last time, so I'm asking for your help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_119.korean: 정말 잠깐이면 돼.&n마지막이라 생각해도 좋으니까 부탁할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_121.english: Aaaah!!! Soul Junk is swarming in!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_122.english: What's going on!? Soul Junk is suddenly swarming in?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_124.english: Could it be that Soul Junk was setting a trap in this department store!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_124.korean: 설마 소울정크가 이 백화점에 함정을 치고 있었나!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_125.english: I agree. I'll lead the way, so let's get out of the department store right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_125.korean: 동의합니다.&n모두 내가 앞장설 테니 이대로 백화점 밖으로 빠져나간다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_126.english: What!? You're going to run away? Then what are you going to do about the supplies!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_127.english: This isn't the time to be worrying about that. If you push yourself too hard, many people could die.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_127.korean: 지금 그런 걸 신경 쓸 때가 아니잖아.&n무리하다간 많은 사람이 죽을 수도 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_128.english: Did you go through all this trouble just to come all the way here empty-handed and get nothing? You're always busy running away while making a fuss about who's going to die, aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_128.korean: 아무것도 못 얻고 빈손으로 돌아가려고 힘들게 여기까지 들어온 거야?&n항상 그렇게 누가 죽네 마네 하면서 내빼기만 바쁘지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_130.english: … Miss Shirayuri, how many Soul Junk do you have?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_130.korean: …시라유리 양, 소울정크의 수는 어느 정도 입니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_131.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like well over a hundred.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_131.korean: 확실하지는 않지만, 백은 족히 넘어 보여요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_133.english: Don't worry. I will definitely protect everyone.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_134.english: Iris, we'll go downstairs and stop the Soul Junk from coming up.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_134.korean: 이리스, 우린 아래층으로 내려가 소울정크가 올라오지 못하도록 막을 게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_135.english: In the meantime, you guys go upstairs and gather the supplies. Is this okay?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_135.korean: 그동안 너희가 위층으로 올라가서 물자를 챙겨줘.&n이걸로 괜찮아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_137.english: I'm just trying to respect your opinion.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_138.english: … Even if you say that, we will divide the supplies accurately!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_139.english: That's fine. If you want, you can take more.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_139.korean: 그걸로 괜찮아.&n뭣 하면 더 가져가도 상관없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_14.english: Hehe, it's nothing. I was just glad that Miss Iris came.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_14.korean: 후후, 아무것도 아니에요.&n이렇게 이리스 양이 와주셔서 다행이라고 생각했을 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_140.english: Hmph... Everyone follow me! We're going up to grab supplies!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_140.korean: 흥… 모두 따라와!&n우리는 위로 올라가 물자를 챙긴다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_142.english: Hehe, I think it wasn't a bad choice. Miss Iris will probably see Mr. Tenebris in a new light as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_142.korean: 후후, 나쁘지 않은 선택이었다고 전 생각해요.&n이리스 양도 조금은 테네브리스 씨를 다시 보게 될 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_143.english: However, to prove that this decision was right, we must stop the swarming Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_143.korean: 하지만 이 결정이 옳았다는 걸 증명하려면 몰려오는 소울정크를 막아내지 않으면 안 됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_144.english: Thank you. Then let's go! We just have to hold out until Iris gathers the supplies and comes down.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_144.korean: 고맙습니다.&n그럼 가보죠! 이리스가 물자를 챙기고 내려올 때까지 버티는 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_146.english: Sister Iris! Come over here quickly! Everyone has packed their bags to the brim! No one will be able to complain about this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_146.korean: 이리스 언니! 빨리 이쪽으로 오세요!&n다들 가방 한가득 챙겼어요! 이거라면 누구도 불평 못 할 거예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_147.english: Hehe, okay! Let's head back and throw a party!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_148.english: By the way, Iris, what are you going to do going forward?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_148.korean: 그런데 이리스 언니, 앞으로는 어떻게 하실 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_15.english: … This is strictly a personal matter, so don't get the wrong idea. Also, all the supplies I packed are for us. Just keep that in mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_15.korean: …어디까지나 개인적인 일이니까 착각하지 마.&n그리고 내가 챙긴 물자는 전부 우리 쪽 몫이야. 그렇게 알아둬.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_150.english: I'm talking about Mr. Tenebris! We gathered here because we don't like your management policies, Mr. Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_150.korean: 테네브리스 씨 말이에요!&n저희는 테네브리스 씨의 운영 방침이 마음에 들지 않아서 이렇게 모인 거잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_151.english: But if you accept opinions like today... I'm wondering if there's really a need to divide the groups like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_151.korean: 근데 오늘처럼 의견을 받아주면… 굳이 이렇게 그룹을 나눌 필요가 있나 싶어서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_152.english: You little rascal! Are you thinking of betraying me right away just because you showed a decent side once?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_152.korean: 요녀석~! 한 번 괜찮은 모습 보였다고 바로 배신할 생각이야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_153.english: Ah, no! That's not what I meant! I still think Iris is more suitable to be the leader!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_153.korean: 아, 아뇨! 그런 뜻이 아니에요!&n저는 여전히 이리스 언니가 리더로 더 적합하다고 생각해요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_154.english: It's just... I wanted to avoid an unnecessary fight.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_154.korean: 단지… 불필요한 싸움은 피할 수 있었으면 해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_155.english: … Okay. I’ll think about it. I’m not planning to fight blindly, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_155.korean: …알았어. 생각은 해볼게.&n나도 무작정 싸울 생각은 아니니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_156.english: Hehe, as expected, Iris is the best!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_157.english: Then for now, get out of here quickly.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_158.english: Ms. Iris! It's Soul Junk! Soul Junk are pouring down from upstairs! There are a huge number of them!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_158.korean: 이리스 씨! 소울정크 입니다!&n위층에서 소울정크들이 쏟아져 내려오고 있어요! 엄청난 수예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_16.english: I hate it. Why on earth do I have to cooperate with that guy?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_16.korean: 싫어.&n도대체 내가 왜 저 자식이랑 협력해야 하는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_161.english: Sister Iris! What should we do!? Soul Junk is blocking the stairs down too!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_161.korean: 이리스 언니! 어쩌죠!?&n밑 계단에도 소울정크가 막고 있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_162.english: Mo-Everyone run away! I'll hold this place!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_162.korean: 모, 모두 도망쳐!&n여긴 내가 막고 있을게!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_164.english: No, Iris! You have to lead the people out! If you don't take the lead, everyone will scatter!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_164.korean: 안 돼, 이리스! 네가 사람들을 데리고 나가야지!&n네가 앞장서지 않으면 다 흩어지고 말 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_165.english: You ended up coming here because of me! Then I'll take full responsibility to the end—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_165.korean: 여긴 나때문에 오게 됐어!&n그럼 내가 끝까지 책임을 지고ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_166.english: Don't talk nonsense! If you die here, what will become of us who went to all the trouble to gather here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_166.korean: 바보같은 소리 하지 마!&n네가 이런데서 죽으면 기껏 모인 우리는 뭐가 되는데!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_167.english: We all united with one heart and mind because we like you, didn't we? If we die, we're just casualties. But if you die, everyone will be sad.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_167.korean: 다들 네가 좋아서 한마음 한뜻으로 뭉친 거잖아.&n우리야 죽으면 그냥 발생한 사망자인데. 네가 죽으면 모두 슬퍼할 거라고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_169.english: Ugh... Damn it! Everyone follow me! I'll clear a path no matter what!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_169.korean: 큭… 젠장! 모두 날 따라와! 내가 어떻게든 길을 열겠어!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_17.english: Iris, listen calmly. I know how you feel, but this time, it is right to cooperate.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_17.korean: 이리스, 침착하게 들어봐. 네 기분은 알지만 이번만은 협력하는 게 옳아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_171.english: This can't be... This can't be happening...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_171.korean: 이럴 리가 없는데… 이렇게 될 리가 없는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_172.english: Why did everyone die...? What on earth did I do wrong?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_172.korean: 왜 다 죽었지…? 내가 대체 뭘 잘못했다고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_174.english: Tenebris…! Come to think of it, everything turned out this way because of that guy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_174.korean: 테네브리스…!&n생각해보면 모든 게 그 자식 때문에 이렇게 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_175.english: That bastard sent us here, and he was the one who sent us upstairs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_175.korean: 그 자식이 우리를 이곳으로 보냈고,&n위층으로 올려 보낸 것도 그 자식이었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_176.english: That bastard sent us here even though he knew the Soul Junk had dug a trap and was waiting.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_176.korean: 그 자식은 소울정크들이 함정을 파고 기다리고 있었다는 걸 알면서도 우리를 이곳에 보낸 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_177.english: To get rid of us who are getting in the way of the camp!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_18.english: You have every right to say such things when you haven't even properly cooperated until now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_18.korean: 이제껏 제대로 협력한 적도 없으면서 잘도 그런 소리를 하네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_181.english: Iris, I'm glad you're safe. Fortunately, we didn't suffer any major damage.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_181.korean: 이리스, 무사했구나.&n다행히 우리 쪽에는 큰 피해가 없었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_182.english: A relief? What's so fortunate about it? You must be really disappointed that I came back alive.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_182.korean: 다행? 뭐가 다행인데?&n내가 살아 돌아와서 많이 아쉬운가 보네?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_183.english: What do you mean by "it's a shame"? Wait, so few people returned... What happened to the others?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_183.korean: 아쉽다니 무슨 말이야?&n잠깐, 돌아온 인원이 적은데... 다른 사람들은 어떻게 된 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_184.english: Ha! Are you really asking because you don't know?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_186.english: Yeah, I was completely helpless. They intended to kill everyone, so it must be a shame that so many survived.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_186.korean: 그래, 꼼짝없이 당했어.&n모두 죽이려고 했는데, 이렇게나 살아남아서 아쉽겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_188.english: You ordered this, didn't you? You made me come here, didn't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_188.korean: 네가 시킨 거지?&n네가 날 여기로 오게 만든 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_190.english: Don't play innocent! You sent us up here even though you knew Soul Junk had set a trap and was waiting!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_190.korean: 시치미 떼지 마!&n소울정크가 함정을 파고 기다린다는 걸 알면서도 네가 우리를 위로 올려보냈잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_191.english: Of course, it's because I bothered you! You were afraid of me building up my power and increasing my strength, weren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_191.korean: 그야 내가 거슬렸으니까!&n내가 세력을 만들고, 힘을 키우는 게 두려웠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_192.english: So that's why you intended to half-kill them or wipe them all out! Seriously... you're really smart!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_192.korean: 그러니까 반쯤 죽이거나 전부 없앨 속셈이었던 거겠지!&n진짜… 머리가 잘 돌아가네!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_193.english: Miss Iris, please calm down for now. She is quite sensitive right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_193.korean: 이리스 양, 일단 진정해요.&n지금 상당히 예민한 상태예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_194.english: No, I'm perfectly rational! Everyone died because of that bastard, and I almost died too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_194.korean: 아니, 난 충분히 이성적이야!&n저 자식 때문에 다 죽고 나까지 죽을 뻔했어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_195.english: So I have to kill him before he dies. If I don't kill him, I'll die...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_195.korean: 그러니까 죽기 전에 죽여야 돼, 안 죽이면 내가 죽어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_21.english: Now, don't do that, listen carefully, Iris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_21.korean: 자, 그러지 말고, 이리스 잘 들어봐.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_22.english: We are cooperating solely to maximize our mutual benefits. We have absolutely no other intentions.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_22.korean: 우리가 협력하는 건 어디까지나 서로 최대의 이익을 얻기 위한 거야.&n다른 의도는 전혀 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_23.english: The department store we are heading to is already swarming with camps eyeing supplies. It started as a dispute between wandering camps, but now it has escalated into a conflict between large garrison camps.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_23.korean: 지금 우리가 가려는 백화점은 물자를 노리는 캠프들로 이미 들끓고 있어.&n처음엔 유랑 캠프 간의 다툼이었지만, 지금은 대형 주둔 캠프끼리의 분쟁으로 번졌지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_24.english: It would be nice if this could be resolved through dialogue or negotiation, but the situation doesn't seem to allow for that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_24.korean: 대화나 협상으로 해결되면 좋을 텐데, 상황이 그렇지 못하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_25.english: A large garrison camp has over a hundred personnel alone. No matter how abundant the supplies are, they won't last long.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_25.korean: 대형 주둔 캠프는 인원만 해도 백 명 이상.&n아무리 백화점 물자라 해도 오래 버티진 못해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_26.english: Then why don't you take Lily with you, too? Isn't that why you brought her along?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_26.korean: 그럼 릴리도 데려가지 그래? 이럴 때 쓰려고 데려다 놓은 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_27.english: No matter how friendly Lily is to us, it is still too early to involve her in a fight with people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_27.korean: 릴리가 아무리 우리에게 호의적이라 해도, 아직 사람과의 싸움에 관여시키기에는 일러.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_28.english: There might still be some other camps that view Lily as a Desire Walker. If that happens, you will turn all the other camps into enemies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_28.korean: 다른 캠프에서는 아직 릴리를 데자이어 워커로 보는 곳도 있을 테니까.&n그렇게 되면 다른 모든 캠프를 적으로 돌리게 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_29.english: Ultimately, the power we have gathered right now is all we can use. If we have to face off against other camps, it would be best to at least cooperate among ourselves.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_29.korean: 결국 우리가 쓸 수 있는 전력은 지금 모인 이 정도뿐.&n다른 캠프와 맞붙는다면 최소한 우리끼리라도 협력하는 게 좋아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_3.english: Okay. I hope Ms. Shirayuri leads the accompanying camp members well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_3.korean: 좋습니다.&n동행하는 캠프 인원들은 시라유리 씨가 잘 이끌어 주시길 바랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_30.english: Miss Iris, right now you need to act with a realistic perspective. I would like to ask you to do the same.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_30.korean: 이리스 양, 지금은 현실적인 면을 생각해서 행동할 필요가 있어요.&n저도 이렇게 부탁드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_31.english: Haa... Got it. We can just cooperate for a moment.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_32.english: Instead, we will definitely divide the supplies, so keep that in mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_32.korean: 대신 물자는 확실하게 나눌 테니까 그리 알라고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_35.english: Stop pretending to care. It's annoying.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_35.korean: 신경 쓰는 척은 집어쳐. 재수 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_37.english: Still, it seems we have agreed to cooperate safely.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_38.english: Our relationship won't improve suddenly, but we will try our best to work things out.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_38.korean: 서로 관계가 갑자기 나아지진 않겠지만, 최대한 풀어가 보겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_39.english: Kent asked me to stay at the camp. Because someone has to guard this place.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_39.korean: 켄트는 캠프에 남아 달라고 부탁했습니다.&n누군가는 이곳을 지켜야 하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_4.english: Commander, I ask you to focus on command rather than combat.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_40.english: Just having Iris brought here was a great help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_40.korean: 이리스를 이렇게 불러와준 것만으로도 큰 도움이 됐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_43.english: As expected, there are many people targeting the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_43.korean: 역시 예상대로 백화점을 노리는 사람이 많군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_44.english: Why? Are you scared or something? The great Soulworker is really such a coward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_44.korean: 왜? 쫄리기라도 해?&n대단하신 소울워커 님이 겁도 참 많으시네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_45.english: I'm not fighting alone. If we escalate this for no reason, the damage to our side will be severe as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_45.korean: 나 혼자 싸우는 게 아니잖아.&n괜히 일을 키우면 이쪽 피해도 심해져.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_47.english: You came all the way here and you're going to play it safe? What on earth are you doing here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_47.korean: 여기까지 와서 몸이나 사리겠다고?&n넌 대체 여기 뭐 하러 온 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_48.english: Are you planning to let the other guys take everything from us and everything else?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_48.korean: 다른 녀석들에게 물자고 뭐고 다 뺏길 생각이야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_51.english: Miss Iris, let's trust Mr. Tenebris and wait for now. It won't be too late to act if a real problem arises.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_51.korean: 이리스 양, 지금은 테네브리스 씨를 믿고 기다려 보죠.&n정말 문제가 생기면 그때 움직여도 늦지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_52.english: Fine, I'll hold back just this once. Let's see what that so-called best effort of yours is all about.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_52.korean: 그래, 딱 한 번만 참는다.&n그 잘난 최선이라는 걸 함 보자고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_53.english: You're just pathetically hiding yourself. When are you going to fight properly?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_53.korean: 한심하게 몸이나 숨기고 있고.&n언제쯤 돼야 좀 제대로 싸울 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_55.english: We can't just blindly fight other camps. We have to time our entry perfectly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_55.korean: 다른 캠프와 마구잡이로 싸울 순 없잖아.&n진입할 타이밍을 확실하게 재야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_57.english: You're just going to knock on the doors of empty department stores and spout lines like, "Even though we didn't get anything, if someone else was saved, that's enough," aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_57.korean: 텅 빈 백화점 문이나 두드리면서, '비록 우린 아무것도 못 얻었지만 다른 사람이 구원받았다면 그걸로 충분해' 같은 대사나 칠 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_58.english: Even I don't have that much tolerance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_58.korean: 아무리 나라도 그 정도 아량은 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_59.english: I'm just waiting for the right timing to enter. I'm going to take advantage of the situation while the other camps are fighting each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_59.korean: 내부 진입 타이밍을 재고 있을 뿐이야.&n다른 캠프끼리 싸우는 도중에 어부지리를 노릴 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_6.english: There is a task Kent asked me to leave to him. If you wait a little while—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_6.korean: 켄트가 자기에게 맡겨달라 한 일이 있습니다.&n조금 기다리면ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_61.english: Just as Mr. Tenebris said, look for an opportunity, and when that moment comes, fight fiercely just as Miss Iris suggested.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_61.korean: 테네브리스 씨 말대로 기회를 살피고,&n그 순간이 오면 이리스 양 의견대로 화끈하게 싸우는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_62.english: With this, your opinions combine, so there's no need to argue about whose view is better, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_62.korean: 이러면 두 분의 의견이 합쳐저 누구의 의견이 어떻다 할 필요도 없겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_63.english: Hmm... It's annoying because I strangely understand what he's saying...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_63.korean: 으음… 쟤 말은 이상하게 이해가 가서 짜증 난단 말이지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_64.english: Okay, but when the opportunity comes, make sure you strike decisively. Don't get scared and run away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_64.korean: 좋아, 대신 기회가 왔을 때는 확실히 치는 거다. 쫄아서 도망치지나 말고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_66.english: After that, we found a good timing to enter and easily took over the interior of the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_66.korean: - 그 뒤로 우리는 좋은 진입 타이밍을 찾아, 어렵지 않게 백화점 내부를 차지했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_67.english: Phew, the Soul Junk is pretty much sorted out.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_69.english: Yeah... Huh? What is this? There's something lying here—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_69.korean: 그렇네… 응? 뭐야 여기에 뭔가 떨어져 있ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_72.english: No, I just noticed you were suddenly spacing out. Is there something on that teddy bear?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_72.korean: 아뇨, 갑자기 멍하니 있으시길래.&n그 곰인형에 뭐가 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_73.english: Ahaha, it's nothing. I just thought it was a cute teddy bear!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_73.korean: 아하하, 아무것도 아니야 그냥 귀여운 곰인형이구나, 싶어서!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_75.english: Anyway, that certain loser who thinks he's cool doesn't seem to have shown his full potential.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_75.korean: 아무튼, 자기가 쿨한 줄 아는 어느 찐따는 제 실력을 다 내지도 않은 것 같지만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_76.english: Why on earth are you playing it half-heartedly? Are you hiding your true power like Kent?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_76.korean: 대체 왜 적당히 하는 거야? 켄트처럼 진짜 힘을 숨기는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_78.english: If I act with all my heart toward people, it’s just like being a robber or a thug. I’m deliberately keeping my distance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_78.korean: 사람을 상대로 진심을 다하면 그건 강도나 양아치와 마찬가지니까요.&n일부러 선을 지키는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_79.english: Isn't it just that you're doing it half-heartedly because you don't want to put in the effort? You always cover for him no matter what he does.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_79.korean: 그냥 힘쓰기가 싫어서 적당히 하는 게 아니고?&n넌 걔가 뭘해도 다 감싸주더라.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_80.english: No, I just wanted to say that Mr. Tenebris is going through his own struggles.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_80.korean: 아뇨, 저는 단지 테네브리스 씨가 나름대로의 고생을 하고 있다는 걸 말씀드리려는 것뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_82.english: What? Wait, wait! Miss Iris? What's going on all of a sudden?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_82.korean: 네? 자, 잠깐! 이리스 양? 갑자기 무슨 일인가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_83.english: You… do you perhaps genuinely respect that Tenebris or something?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_83.korean: 너… 혹시 진심으로 저 테네브리스를 존경하고 있거나 그래?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_84.english: I do respect him. At the very least, there is no doubt that he is taking the lead and working hard for the people at the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_84.korean: 존경은 하고 있습니다.&n적어도 캠프 사람들을 위해 앞장서고 노력하고 있다는 것만큼은 틀림없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_85.english: I don't know what's so admirable about that old-fashioned jerk who always acts like he knows everything.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_85.korean: 항상 지가 다 아는 척하는 꼰대의 뭐가 그리 존경스럽다는 건지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_86.english: Listen up, Shirayuri. That guy is a pathetic loser who has lost his mind because he's tainted by his own hypocrisy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_86.korean: 잘 들어, 시라유리.&n저놈은 자기의 위선에 물들어서 제정신을 못 차리는 한심한 놈이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_87.english: Especially the way they're spouting nonsense, saying things like you can save everyone just by influencing one Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_87.korean: 특히나 데자이어 워커 한 마리 감화시켰다고 전부 구할 수 있니 뭐니, 정신 나간 소리 지껄이고 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_88.english: Things like Lily are like bombs that could explode at any moment. Other people are trembling with anxiety too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_88.korean: 릴리 같은 것들은 언제 터질지 모르는 폭탄이라고.&n다른 사람들도 불안에 떨고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_89.english: But Miss Iris, I heard that Mr. Tenebris is keeping his promise to the missing Mr. Lord, isn't that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_89.korean: 하지만 이리스 양.&n듣기로 그건 테네브리스 씨가 실종된 로드 씨와의 약속을 지키기 위한 게 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_9.english: It's unexpected that you'd move with us.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_90.english: Shirayuri. Is someone whose whereabouts you don't even know important? Or is someone who is alive right now more important?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_90.korean: 시라유리.&n어디 있는지도 모르는 사람이 중요해? 아니면 지금 당장 살아있는 사람이 중요해?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_91.english: … Of course, the living are important.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_92.english: That's right, it's no different from an old person rejecting modern civilization to uphold outdated traditions, such as promises made to someone who isn't even right in front of them.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_92.korean: 맞아, 눈앞에 있지도 않는 사람과의 약속이니 뭐니 낡은 전통을 지키자고 현대 문명을 거절하는 노인과 다를 게 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_93.english: You should think carefully too. Don't be fooled by the nonsense of old-fashioned jerks; let's look at reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_93.korean: 너도 잘 생각해봐.&n꼰대의 헛소리에 현혹되지 말고 현실을 보자고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_94.english: It seems like it's too late for that commander or whatever, as he's already been swayed by the old farts, but at least we need to wake up.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_94.korean: 그 사령관이니 뭐니 하는 사람은 이미 꼰대에게 현혹돼서 늦은 것 같지만, 우리라도 정신 차려야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_98.english: It is true that Mr. Tenebris has many flaws. There must be many things to be disappointed about or complaints.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_98.korean: 테네브리스 씨에게 단점이 많은 건 사실이에요.&n아쉬운 점이나 불만이 많겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_99.english: However, I am thinking hard behind the scenes and striving to put it into practice just as much.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_99.korean: 하지만 그만큼 보이지 않는 곳에서 고민하고, 실천하려고 애쓰고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_1.english: After that, Iris disappeared from us with the surviving half of her companions.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_1.korean: - 그 뒤로 이리스는 살아남은 절반의 동료를 데리고 우리에게서 사라졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_10.english: Wouldn't it be the feeling of wanting to get as far away from here as possible?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_10.korean: 가능한 여기서 멀리 떨어지고 싶다는 심정이 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_101.english: Anyway, there is nothing good about listening only to adults.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_101.korean: 아무튼, 어른들 말만 들어서 좋을 거 하나 없다는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_102.english: … Yes, I was wrong. Because I listened to the adults and didn't step forward myself… I lost someone so precious to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_102.korean: …그래, 틀렸어.&n어른의 말을 듣고, 내가 직접 나서지 않았던 탓에… 너무 소중한 사람을 잃었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_103.english: If it weren't for that, I wouldn't be living so rebelliously now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_103.korean: 그 일만 아니었어도 지금 이렇게까지 반항적으로 살진 않았을 테지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_104.english: … Ha, whatever. How did I end up telling a little kid like this? I just got carried away with my mouth today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_104.korean: …하, 됐어. 어쩌다가 이런 꼬맹이한테 이런 얘기까지 하네.&n오늘따라 괜히 입이 가벼워졌어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_107.english: I'm such a fool. Why did I get so worked up over a child?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_107.korean: 나도 참, 바보 같네. 어린아이 상대로 왜 열을 낸 건지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_108.english: Still... thank you. Thank you for telling me I wasn't wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_108.korean: 그래도... 고맙다. 내가 틀리지 않았다고 말해줘서.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_109.english: And… I suppose that’s not what you meant.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_109.korean: 그리고… 그런 의도로 말한 건 아니겠지만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_110.english: Little kid…? Anyway, this big sister is still a fresh-faced 'high school girl,' you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_110.korean: 꼬맹이…? 아무튼간에 이 누나는 아직 파릇파릇한 '여고생' 이란다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_113.english: That is certainly how it looks to a child's eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_113.korean: 어린아이의 눈으로는 분명 그렇게 보이는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_114.english: Is it 'Everything adults say is wrong'...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_114.korean: 어른들이 하는 말은 전부 틀렸다' 인가…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_13.english: I'm glad if it was helpful.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_14.english: It looks okay for now, but it won't last long.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_14.korean: 아직은 괜찮아 보이지만, 오래 버티지는 못할 거예요.
